Bakhumbule oThobhiya loSanibhalathi, Oh Nkulunkulu wami, ngenxa yalokho asebekwenzile; mkhumbule njalo umphrofethikazi uNowadiya labo bonke labobaphrofethi abebekade bezama ukungethusa.
Ngakho umduli waphela ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili ku-Eluli, ngemva kwensuku ezingamatshumi amahlanu lambili.
Izitha zethu zonke sezikuzwile lokho, zonke izizwe eziseduze zesaba zalahla ithemba, ngoba zananzelela ukuthi umsebenzi lo wenziwa uxhaswe nguNkulunkulu.
Njalo, ngalezonsuku izikhulu zakoJuda zazithumezela izincwadi ezinengi kuThobhiya, lezimpendulo zikaThobhiya zabe zilokhu zifika kuzo.
Phela abanengi koJuda babebambelele kuye ngesifungo, ngoba wayengumkhwenyana kaShekhaniya indodana ka-Ara, futhi indodana yakhe uJehohanani yayithethe indodakazi kaMeshulami indodana kaBherekhiya.
Ikanti njalo babelokhu behlezi bengibikela ngezenzo zakhe ezinhle, basuke bayemtshela ukuthi ngitheni. Njalo uThobhiya wathumezela izincwadi ukungethusela.
Umduli usuyakhwe kutsha lezivalo sengizifakile ezindaweni zazo, abalindi bamasango labahlabeleli labaLevi bakhethwa.
Ngabeka umfowethu uHanani ukuphatha iJerusalema, kanye loHananiya umlawuli wesigodlo lenqaba ngoba wayeyindoda elobuqotho, emesabayo uNkulunkulu kulamadoda amanengi.

Ngathi kubo, “Amasango aseJerusalema makangavulwa ilanga lize litshise. Nxa abalindimasango belokhu besemsebenzini, kabavale iminyango bayinxibe. Njalo khethani izakhamizi zeJerusalema ukuba ngabalindi, abanye ezindaweni lapho abamiswe khona, abanye eduze lezindlu zabo.”
Idolobho lalilikhulu libanzi, kodwa kwakulabantu abalutshwana phakathi kwalo, lezindlu zazingakavuselelwa.

Kwathi uNkulunkulu wami wakubeka enhliziyweni yami ukuqoqa ndawonye izikhulu, lezinduna labantukazana nje ukuthi bazobhalisa ngezimuli. Ngathola umbhalo wezizukulwane walabo ababuya kuqala. Nanku engakuthola kubhaliwe lapho:
laba yibo abantu belizwe abafikayo bephuma ebugqilini ababethunjiwe nguNebhukhadineza inkosi yaseBhabhiloni. Baba yizigqili (babuyela eJerusalema lakoJuda, ngulowo waya emzini wakibo,
abeza kanye loZerubhabheli, loJeshuwa, loNehemiya, lo-Azariya loRamiya, loNahamani, loModekhayi, loBhilishani loMisipherethi, loBhigivayi, loNehumi loBhana):
sikaPharoshi ayezinkulungwane ezimbili lekhulu elilamatshumi ayisikhombisa lambili (2,172),
akaShefathiya ayengamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lambili (372),
aka-Ara ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amahlanu lambili (652),
akaPhahathi-Mowabi (ngosendo lukaJeshuwa loJowabi) ayezinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu ayisificaminwembili letshumi lasificaminwembili (2,818),
aka-Elamu ayeyinkulungwane elamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu lane (1,254),
akaZathu ayengamakhulu ayisificaminwembili lamatshumi amane lanhlanu (845),
akaBhinuyi ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amane lasificaminwembili (648),
akaBhebhayi ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amabili lasificaminwembili (628),
aka-Azigadi ayezinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amabili lambili (2,322),
aka-Adonikhamu ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi ayisithupha lasikhombisa (667),
akaBhigivayi ayezinkulungwane ezimbili lamatshumi ayisithupha lasikhombisa (2,067),
aka-Adini ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amahlanu lanhlanu (655),
akaHashumi ayengamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amabili lasificaminwembili (328),
akaBhezayi ayengamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amabili lane (324),
amadoda ayeseBhethilehema leNethofa ayelikhulu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lasificaminwembili (188),
ayeseKhiriyathi-Jeyarimi, leKhefira leBherothi ayengamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amane lantathu (743),
ayeseRama leGebha ayengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amabili lanye (621),
ayeseBhetheli le-Ayi ayelikhulu lamatshumi amabili lantathu (123),
awakweyinye i-Elamu ayeyinkulungwane elamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu lane (1,254),
aseJerikho ayengamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amane lanhlanu (345),
ayeseLodi, eHadidi le-Ono ayengamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amabili lane (721),
ayeseSenaya ayezinkulungwane ezintathu lamakhulu ayisificamunwemunye lamatshumi amathathu (3,930).
sikaJedaya (ngosendo lukaJeshuwa) babengamakhulu ayisificamunwemunye lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lantathu (973),
abakaPhashuri babeyinkulungwane lamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amane lasikhombisa (1,247),
sikaJeshuwa (ngoKhadimiyeli ngosendo lukaHodaviya) babengamatshumi ayisikhombisa lane (74).
sikaShalumi, lo-Atheri, loThalimoni, lo-Akhubi, loHathitha loShobhayi babelikhulu lamatshumi amathathu lasificaminwembili (138).
Izinceku zethempelini labezizukulwane zezinceku zikaSolomoni babengamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi ayisificamunwemunye lambili (392).
Abalandelayo laba bavela emadolobheni aseTheli Mela, eTheli Hasha, eKherubi, e-Adoni, lase-Imeri, kodwa behluleka ukuveza ukuthi usendo lwabo lwaphuma ko-Israyeli:
sikaDelaya, loThobhiya loNekhoda babengamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amane lambili (642).
sikaHobhaya, esikaHakhozi lesikaBhazilayi (indoda eyayithethe indodakazi kaBhazilayi umGiliyadi layo yayibizwa ngalelobizo).
Laba baphenya imibhalo yembali yezimuli zabo, kodwa bayiswela ngakho basuswa ebuphristini kwathiwa bangcolile.
Ngakho-ke, umbusi wabalaya ukuthi bangakudli loba yikuphi ukudla okungcwele kuze kubekhona umphristi wokubuza inkatho i-Urimi leThumimi.
Ixuku lonke lalilinani elifika inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lambili lamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi ayisithupha (42,360),

ngaphandle kwezinceku zabo ezesilisa labesifazane ezazifika inkulungwane eziyisikhombisa lamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amathathu lasikhombisa (7,337); njalo belabahlabeleli besilisa labesifazane abafika amakhulu amabili lamatshumi amane lanhlanu (245).

Kwakulamabhiza ayefika amakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amathathu lasithupha (736), imbongolo ezingamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amane lanhlanu (245), amakamela angamakhulu amane lamatshumi amathathu lanhlanu (435),
labobabhemi abazinkulungwane eziyisithupha lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amabili (6,720).

Ezinye inhloko zezimuli zancedisa emsebenzini. Umbusi wanikela esikhwameni esikhulu, amadrakhima egolide ayinkulungwane (1,000), imiganu engamatshumi amahlanu (50) lezigqoko zabaphristi ezingamakhulu amahlanu lamatshumi amathathu (530).
Abanye abazinhloko zezimuli baphosela esikhwameni amadrakhima egolide azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili (20,000) lamamina esiliva azinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu amabili (2,200).

Sekukonke okwaphiwa ngabantu bonke kwaba ngamadrakhima egolide azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili (20,000), amamina esiliva azinkulungwane ezimbili (2,000) lezigqoko zabaphristi ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lasikhombisa (67).
Abaphristi, labaLevi, labalindimasango, labahlabeleli, lezinceku zethempelini, kanye labanye abantu lo-Israyeli wonke, bahlala emadolobheni akibo.

name: Esther
chapters: Kwathi uModekhayi esezwile ngakho konke okwasekwenziwe, wadabula iziqgoko zakhe, wagqoka amasaka okulila, wazihuqa ngomlotha, waphuma wangena phakathi komuzi ekhala kakhulu njalo kabuhlungukazi.
Kodwa wahamba wayafika esangweni lenkosi, ngoba akulamuntu owayevunyelwa ukungena egqoke amasaka okulila.
Kuzozonke izabelo lapho isimiso somthetho lomlayo wenkosi okwafika khona, kwaba lokulila okukhulu kubaJuda, bazila ukudla, bakhala njalo belila. Abanengi balala emlotheni begqoke amasaka okulila.
Kwathi izinceku zika-Esta kanye labathenwa bakhe befika bemtshela ngoModekhayi, waba lokudabuka okukhulu. Wamthumela izembatho zokuthi agqoke endaweni yamasaka okulila, kodwa wala ukuzamukela.
U-Esta wasebiza uHathakhi, omunye wabathenwa benkosi owayekhethwe ukuba yinceku yakhe, wamlaya ukuba ayedingisisa lokho okwakukhathaza uModekhayi lembangela yakho.
Ngakho uHathakhi waya kuModekhayi egcekeni ledolobho phambi kwesango lenkosi.
UModekhayi wamtshela konke okwakwenzakale kuye, kugoqela inani lemali uHamani ayethembise ukulibhadala lingene enothweni yenkosi kusenzelwa ukubhujiswa kwamaJuda.

Wamupha njalo amazwi esimemezelo leso ayesekhutshwe aba ngumthetho omisiweyo wokubhujiswa kwabo, owawumenyezelwe eSusa, ukuze awutshengise u-Esta njalo amchazele ngawo; njalo wamtshela ukuthi amkhuthaze ukuba aye enkosini ukuyacela isihawu sayo encengela abantu bakibo.
UHathakhi wabuyela wayamtshela u-Esta lokho okwakukhulunywe nguModekhayi.

“Zonke iziphathamandla zenkosi kanye labasezigodlweni ezabelweni bayakwazi ukuthi inkosi ilomthetho owodwa zwi kuloba yiphi indoda loba owesifazane osondela enkosini angene endlini ephakathi engabizwanga; kufanele abulawe, ngaphandle kokuba inkosi yelule intonga yayo yegolide imkhombe ngayo ukuze impilo yakhe iphephe. Kodwa, sekwedlule amalanga angamatshumi amathathu selokhu ngacina ukubizelwa enkosini.”
waphendula wathi: “Ungacabangi ukuthi ngoba wena usendlini yenkosi nguwe wedwa kuwo wonke amaJuda ozaphepha.

Nxa ungala uthule ngalesisikhathi, usizo lokukhululwa kwamaJuda kuzavela kwenye indawo, kodwa wena kanye lemuli kayihlo lizabhubha. Njalo kwazi bani, ukuthi uze kulesi sikhundla sobukhosi ngenxa yesikhathi esinjengalesi na?”

“Hamba uyebuthanisa ndawonye wonke amaJuda aseSusa, lingizilele ukudla. Lingaze ladla loba ukunatha okwensuku ezintathu, ebusuku lemini. Mina kanye lezincekukazi zami sizazila njengani. Nxa lokhu sekwenziwe, ngizakuya enkosini loba nje lokho kungekho emthethweni. Nxa ngisifa, ngiyabe ngifile.”
Ngakho uModekhayi wasuka wayakwenza lokho okwakulaywe ngu-Esta.

Ngelanga lesithathu u-Esta wagqoka izembatho zakhe zobukhosi wema enkundleni engaphakathi kwesigodlo phambi kwendlu yenkosi. Inkosi yayihlezi esihlalweni sayo sobukhosi endlini yayo, ikhangele emnyango.
Yathi ibona iNdlovukazi u-Esta imi enkundleni, yathokoza ngaye, yasiselula intonga yayo yegolide eyayisesandleni sayo, yamkhomba ngayo. U-Esta wasesondela wathinta isihloko sentonga.
Inkosi yasibuza yathi, “Kutheni Ndlovukazi Esta? Siyini isicelo sakho na? Uzanikwa loba yini, okungafika kungxenye yombuso.”
U-Esta wathi, “Nxa inkosi ithokoza ngalokhu, bengicela ukuthi inkosi kanye loHamani beze lamhla edilini engililungisele yona.”
Inkosi yathi, “UHamani keze khathesi, ukuze kwenziwe okucelwa ngu-Esta.” Inkosi loHamani baya edilini elalilungiswe ngu-Esta.
Kwathi besanatha iwayini, inkosi yambuza njalo u-Esta yathi, “Siyini isicelo sakho? Uzakukwamukeliswa. Kuyini okucelayo na? Uzanikwa loba yini okungafika kungxenye yombuso.”
U-Esta waphendula wathi, “Isikhalazo sami lesicelo sami yilokhu:

Nxa inkosi ingamukela ngomusa njalo nxa inkosi ithokoza ngokwamukela isikhalazo sami njalo igcwalise isicelo sami, bengicela ukuthi inkosi kanye loHamani kusasa beze edilini engizabalungisela lona. Kulapho engizaphendula okubuzwe yinkosi.”

UHamani wasuka lapho mhlalokho ethabe kakhulukazi. Kodwa uthe ebona uModekhayi esesangweni lenkosi wananzelela ukuthi kamsukumeli loba ukutshengisa ukwesaba phambi kwakhe, wagcwalelana ngokumthukuthelela uModekhayi.
Kodwa wazibamba waya emzini wakhe, wabiza abangane bakhe ndawonye kanye loZereshi umkakhe,

uHamani wasezincoma kubo ngenotho yakhe enengi, langamadodana akhe amanengi, kanye lazozonke izindlela inkosi eyayimhlonipha ngazo lokuthi imphakamise yambeka phezu kwezinye izikhulu leziphathamandla.
UHamani wengeza wathi, “Njalo akusikho kodwa lokhu. Yimi ngedwa zwi umuntu omenywe yiNdlovukazi u-Esta ukuba ngiphelekezele inkosi edilini elenzileyo. Njalo usenginxusile kanye lenkosi kusasa.
Kodwa konke lokhu akungisuthisi ikakhulu nxa ngilokhu ngibona umJuda loya onguModekhayi ehlezi esangweni lenkosi.”

Umkakhe uZereshi kanye labangane bakhe bonke bathi kuye, “Yenza indawo yokulengisa abantu, ibe zingalo ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu ubude, ubusucela inkosi ekuseni ukuba ilengise uModekhayi lapho. Ube usuziyela edilini uchelesile.” Umcabango lo wamthokozisa kakhulu uHamani, yasisakhiwa indawo yokulengisa.

name: Job
chapters: Elizweni lase-Uzi kwakuhlala indoda eyayithiwa nguJobe. Indoda le yayingelasici, iqotho; yayimesaba uNkulunkulu njalo ikuxwaya okubi.

ilezimvu eziyizinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, amakamela azinkulungwane ezintathu, izipani zenkabi ezingamakhulu amahlanu labobabhemi abangamakhulu amahlanu, njalo ilezisebenzi ezinengi. Yayinothile kulabo bonke abantu beMpumalanga.
Amadodana akhe ayesenza amazopha okwenza amadili okuthakazelela amalanga okuzalwa kwawo ezindlini zawo, anxuse odadewabo bobathathu ukuzakudla anathe labo.

Kwakusithi mhla idili liphela, uJobe wayewabiza azowahlambulula. Ekuseni kakhulu wayesenza umnikelo wokutshiswa wamunye ngamunye esithi, “Mhlawumbe abantwabami benzile isono bathuka uNkulunkulu ezinhliziyweni zabo.” Lo waba ngumkhuba wakhe uJobe.
Ngelinye ilanga izingilosi zeza ukuzezethula phambi kukaThixo, loSathane weza lazo.
USathane wamphendula uThixo wathi, “Ngivela ekuzulazuleni emhlabeni, ngihambahamba ngisiya le lale.”
UThixo wasesithi kuSathane, “Usuke wayinanzelela yini inceku yami uJobe? Kakho emhlabeni onjengaye; kalasici, uqondile, indoda emesabayo uNkulunkulu, exwaya okubi.”
USathane waphendula wathi, “Kambe uJobe umesaba kungelasizatho na uNkulunkulu?
Kawumbiyelanga ngothango yini yena lendlu yakhe, kanye lakho konke alakho? Uwubusisile umsebenzi wezandla zakhe kuze kuthi imihlambi yakhe yezimvu leyenkomo igcwale ilizwe lonke.
Kodwa ake welule isandla sakho uchithe konke alakho, uzabona uzakuthuka ebusweni bakho.”
UThixo wathi kuSathane, “Kulungile, konke alakho kusezandleni zakho, kodwa yena ngokwakhe ungamthinti.”
Ngelinye ilanga amadodana kaJobe lamadodakazi akhe ayezitika ngokudla, enatha iwayini endlini yomnewabo omdala,
isithunywa safika kuJobe sathi, “Inkabi bezilima labobabhemi besidla eduze khonapho,
kwafika amaSabhini ahlasela aqhuba konke ahamba. Izisebenzi azicakazile ngenkemba kwasala mina ngedwa engisindileyo ukuzakubikela!”
Sisakhuluma esinye isithunywa safika sathi, “Umlilo kaNkulunkulu wehle uvela ezulwini wazitshisa izimvu lezisebenzi, kusele mina ngedwa engisindileyo ukuzakubikela!”

Elokhu esakhuluma kwafika esinye isithunywa sathi, “AmaKhaladiya abe ngamaqembu amathathu ehlela emakameleni akho awaqhuba ahamba lawo. Izisebenzi azicakazile ngenkemba kwasila mina ngedwa ukuzakubikela!”
Elokhu esakhuluma kwafika njalo esinye isithunywa sathi, “Amadodana lamadodakazi akho abesidla edilini enatha iwayini endlini yomnewabo omdala,
kwathi masinyane vungu isavunguzane siqhamuka enkangala saphekula amagumbi womane endlu. Yathi mbo phezu kwabo bahle bafa, kwasila mina ngedwa ukuzakubikela!”
Ekuzwa lokho uJobe wasukuma wadabula isembatho sakhe, waphuca ikhanda lakhe. Wazilahla phansi wakhonza
Phakathi kwakho konke lokhu uJobe kazange enze isono ngokubeka umlandu wokuthi athi uNkulunkulu wonile.
Ngemva kwalokho uJobe wavula umlomo wakhe waliqalekisa ilanga azalwa ngalo.
Sengathi ubumnyama lethunzi elikhulu kungaluginya njalo;
sengathi bungayekelwa ukubalwa kanye lezinsuku zomnyaka
sengathi kungeze kwezwakala umsindo wentokozo ngalo.
Sengathi labo abaqalekisa insuku bangaluqalekisa lolosuku,
Kumbe kungani ngingathukuzwanga emhlabathini njengomphunzo na,
njengosane oluvele lungazange lubone ukukhanya kosuku?
Kungani ukukhanya kuphiwa labo abasosizini na,
Ngoba ukububula sokuphenduke ukudla kwami kwansukuzonke;
“Nxa umuntu angaphosa ilizwi nje kuwe uzacunuka na?
Kodwa manje uhlupho luze kuwe, usuphela amandla;
Kungani ukukholwa kwakho kungabi yiso isibindi sakho na
lezindlela zakho ezimsulwa zibe lithemba lakho na?
Khumbula manje: Ngubani owathi engelacala wabhubha na?
Kungaphi lapho abaqotho abake babhujiswa khona na?
wahlasimula umzimba wami lenwele zami zema.
nxa ebeka izingilosi zakhe umlandu ngokona,
pho-ke kuzakuba njani kulabo abahlala ezindlini zodaka,
Phakathi kokusa lokuhlwa bayabhidlizwa babe yizicucu;
Insuku zakhe kazifani lezomuntu oqhatshiweyo na?
Ngithi nxa ngilala ngicabange ngithi, ‘Kuzakusa nini na’?
Khumbula, Oh Nkulunkulu, ukuthi impilo yami ngumoya nje;
amehlo ami kawayikufa akubona njalo ukuthokoza.
Ilihlo elingibonayo khathesi alisayikuphinde lingibone futhi;
Kasoze lanini aphinde angene endlini yakhe;
Ngithi lapho ngicabanga ukuthi umbheda wami uzangiduduza
Ngiyayeyisa impilo yami; kangiloyisi ukuphila okwaphakade.
Umuntu uyini ongaze uzihluphe kangaka ngaye,
Kawusoze uke ukhangele eceleni kwami na,
Aluba ngenze isono, kuyini engikwenzileyo kuwe,
ngoba ngezinsuku ezizayo uzabe usuphumelela kakhulu.
ngoba thina sizelwe izolo nje, kasazi lutho,
Konje imihlanga ingakhula ibe mide ingekho exhaphozini na?
Sinjalo isiphetho sabo bonke abakhohlwa uNkulunkulu;
ezinye izihlahla zibe zilokhu zikhula emhlabathini lowo.
Kodwa umuntu wenyama angalunga yini kuNkulunkulu?
Ukuhlakanipha kwakhe kujulile, amandla akhe makhulu.
Ngubani kambe oke wamelana laye wasinda?
labasekeli bakaRahabi besaba bawela ezinyaweni zakhe.
ngingancenga uMahluleli wami kuphela ukuthi angihawukele.
Loba ngingabe ngimsulwa, umlomo wami ubungangilahla;
abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwethu sobabili,
omunye nje ongasusa uswazi lukaNkulunkulu kimi,
aze aqede lesosikhathi sakhe njengomuntu oqhatshiweyo.
ngokunjalo umuntu ulala phansi angabe esavuka;
Nxa amadodana akhe ezuza udumo, kawakwazi;
loba igcwalise isisu sayo ngomoya otshisayo wempumalanga na?
Umlomo wakho yiwo okulahlayo, hatshi owami;
Umuntu uyini ukuthi abe ngohlanzekileyo na,
njalo akwaze kwedlula muntu wezizweni phakathi kwabo):
Ngezinsuku zakhe zonke umuntu omubi uhlutshwa yizinhlungu,
lomoya wokuphefumula komlomo kaNkulunkulu uzamthwalela kude.
Uzaba njengevini eliphundlwe izithelo zalo zingakavuthwa,
Ngoba ixuku labangamesabiyo uNkulunkulu kalizukuba lezithelo,
lomlilo uzawahangula amathente alabo abathanda isivalamlomo.
Ungubani yena uSomandla ofuna ukuthi simkhonze na?
Kodwa ukuphumelela kwabo kakukho ezandleni zabo,
Kodwa kukangaki na isibane sababi sicinywa?
Ngoba uvele uzihlupha ngani ngemuli avele ezayitshiya
nxa izinyanga zakhe azabelweyo seziphelile na?
Bobabili balaliswe ndawonye eceleni komunye othulini,
ukuthi umuntu omubi uyaphepha ngosuku lokubhujiswa na,
Kambe ngubani omtshela ngobubi bakhe ebusweni bakhe na?
banengi kakhulu njalo abahamba kuqala kulaye.
Pho-ke lingangiduduza njani likhuluma ize nje?
Bekungamupha ntokozo bani uSomandla ukulunga kwakho na?
uhlubula abantu izigqoko zabo basale beze.
Ake ubone phela ukuthi ziphakeme njani izinkanyezi ezisesiqongweni!
Ikanti kunguye owagcwalisa izindlu zabo ngezinto ezinhle,
nxa ususa ububi bube kude lethente lakho
igolide lakho lase-Ofiri ulilahlele emadwaleni ezifuleni,
nguye omisa konke ngemfanelo ezulwini eliphezulu.
Pho umuntu angaba ngolungileyo njani kuNkulunkulu na?
Angenza njani ozelwe ngowesifazane ukuthi ahlanzeke na?
pho umuntu-ke usilela kanganani, oyimpethu nje,
ngubani ongithathele ilungelo lami lokwahlulelwa ngokulunga,
Kangisoze ngivume ukuthi lina lilungile ngelikutshoyo;
Ngoba ulethemba bani ongakholwayo nxa esefile,
Pho, ngeyani inkulumo yonke le eyize na?
ilifa elemukelwa ngumuntu olesihluku sivela kuSomandla:
Loba bebanengi njani abantwabakhe, isabelo sabo yinkemba;
lenzalo yakhe kayisoze lanini izuze ukudla okwaneleyo.
Isifo esibi sizabangcwaba labo abatshiywa nguye besaphila,
Uthi esiyalala enothile, kodwa kasayikuphinda njalo;
esithi uyabaleka ecambalele evika amandla awo.
Kakukho nyoni edla inyama eyaziyo leyondlela efihlekileyo,
Isandla somuntu yiso esihlasela idwala eliyinsengetshe
ilihlo lakhe liwabone wonke amagugu alo.
njalo lentengo yakho ingeke yalinganiswa ngesiliva.
Kungazake kulinganiswe legolide loba amatshe akhazimulayo,
Amatshe amahle ekhorali lejaspa lawo kawabalwa lapha;
njalo nguye yedwa okwaziyo lapho okuhlala khona,
lapho isibane sakhe sisakhanyisa phezu kwekhanda lami
lapho ubudlelwano obukhulu loNkulunkulu busesendlini yami,
lapho indlela yami ifafazwe ngolaza ledwala
Loba ngubani owangizwayo wakhuluma kuhle ngami,
ukwahlulela ngokulunga kwaba yisembatho sami lengwane yami.
Nxa sekukhulume mina, kungakhulumi omunye njalo;
amazwi ami ayengena kamnandi ezindlebeni zabo.
Yimi engangibakhethela ukuthi benzeni ngoba ngisanduna kubo;
Amadoda la womathathu ema ukuphendula uJobe ngoba wayelungile ngokubona kwakhe.
Kodwa u-Elihu indodana kaBharakeli umBhuzi, owendlu kaRamu, wamzondela uJobe ngokuzigeza yena endaweni yokugezwa nguNkulunkulu.
Wayebazondele njalo labangane labo bobathathu ngoba babengayitholanga indlela yokuphikisa uJobe kodwa bemlahlile ngokumsola.
U-Elihu wayeke wema ukukhuluma loJobe ngoba babebadala kulaye.
Kodwa kwathi esebona ukuthi wonke amadoda womathathu ayengaselalutho ayengalutsho, ulaka lwakhe lwavutha.
Ngakho-ke u-Elihu indodana kaBharakeli umBhuzi wathi:
njalo kakusibo bodwa abalupheleyo abakuzwisisayo okulungileyo.
Kodwa kakho lamunye kini otshengise ukuthi uJobe ulahlekile;
kakho omunye wenu osephendule imibono yakhe.
uNkulunkulu kaveze ukuphosisa kwakhe, hatshi umuntu.’
Kodwa uJobe kakaqondisisi amazwi akhe kimi,
izindebe zami zikhuluma ngokukholwa lokho engikwaziyo.
Loba umuntu angajeziswa ngobuhlungu esembhedeni wakhe,
aze ezwe umzimba wakhe usunengwa yikudla
lomoya wakhe usenyanya lokudla okumnandi kakhulu.
lamathambo akhe ayekade evaliwe abonakale egcekeni.
Wawuhlenga umphefumulo wami ukuze ungayi egodini,
khuluma sibili, ngoba ngifuna ukuthi ugezwe umlandu.
Ngakho lalelani kimi lina madoda azwisisayo.
Ngubani owathi kalawule umhlaba wonke na?
Kambe lowo ozonda ukwahlulela ngokulunga angabusa na?
Liyamlahla yini Yena oqotho njalo olamandla?
Bayafa nje masinyane, loba phakathi kobusuku;
UNkulunkulu kasweli ukuthi aphinde abahlolisise abantu,
Benza ukukhala kwabayanga kweza phambi kwakhe,
Kodwa nxa elokhu ezithulele, ngubani ongamsola na?
Angafihla ubuso bakhe ngubani ongambona na?
Pho uNkulunkulu akuvuze ngokwentando yakho na,
uyakloloda ngokuqakeza izandla zakhe phakathi kwethu
Uyawukhulula umbane wakhe ngaphansi kwawo wonke amazulu
Ngemva kwalokho kuza umdumo wokubhonga kwakhe;
wenza izinto ezinkulu ngaphezu kokuzwisisa kwethu.
lezulu athi kulo, ‘Thululeka ube yisihlambo esikhulu.’
Ukuze kuthi bonke abantu abadalayo bakwazi ukusebenza kwakhe,
Ngokuqondisa kwakhe ayaqhela embese umhlaba wonke
ukuze enze loba yini awalaya yona.
loba ukuthelezela umhlaba wakhe ukuze atshengise uthando lwakhe.
Uyakwazi na ukuthi uNkulunkulu uwalawula njani amayezi
Uyakwazi na ukuthi amayezi emi njani elengile,
leyomimangaliso yakhe yena lowo opheleleyo elwazini?
nxa umhlaba uthule zwi kubetha umoya waseningizimu,
Ake usitshele ukuthi pho sithini kuye;
ngeke siyimise kuhle indaba yethu ngoba kumnyama nje lapha kithi.
nxa umoya uwaphephule wonke amayezi kwacethula.
USomandla asingeke simfinyelele njalo uphakeme ulamandla;
ekwahluleleni kwakhe okuhle lokulunga okukhulu kancindezeli.
ngoba kanti kabanaki yini bonke abahlakaniphileyo enhliziyweni?”
UThixo wasekhuluma loJobe ephakathi kwesiphepho. Wathi:
Wawungaphi lapho ngibeka izisekelo zomhlaba na?
Ngubani owamisa izilinganiso zawo na? Phela angithi uyazi!
Ngubani owayidonsayo intambo yokulinganisa kuwo na?
Izinsika zawo zamiswa phezu kwani na,
loba ngubani owamisa ilitshe lawo lekhoneni na
lapho ngisenza amayezi aba yisembatho salo na
ngamisa iminyango yalo lemigoqo endaweni yayo,
lapho engathi, ‘Ungeza uze ufike lapha kodwa ungedluli;
kulapha amagagasi akho azigqajayo aphelela khona?’
Umhlaba ubumbeka isimo njengebumba ufakwe uphawu;
imibala yawo ikhanye ithi bha njengelembu.
loba wahamba ezingoxweni zenziki yalo na?
Amasango okufa aseke abonakaliswa kuwe na?
Usuke wawabona amasango ethunzi lokufa na?
Yiphi indlela eya ekhaya elihlala ukukhanya na?
Uyazazi izindlela eziya emizini yazo na?
Ingaphi indlela eya esigodlweni sokwaba umbane,
loba indawo yokuhlakaza umoya wempumalanga phezu komhlaba na?
Ngubani ozala umtshazo ovela phezulu na
loba ukhuphe inkanyezi ethiwa yiNgulube lemidlwane yayo?
Uyawubukele yini nxa impalakazi izala izinyane layo?
Amazinyane azo ayaqina akhule abe lamandla egangeni;
Ungayithemba yini ngenxa yamandla ayo amakhulu na?
Ungawuyekelela yona umsebenzi wakho onzima na?
Ungayithemba ukuthi izalayitsha amabele akho na
Amatsiyane ayo iyawakhahlameza, kube sengathi akusi wayo;
ingakhathali ukuthi ukubekela kwayo kwaba yize,
Kodwa nxa isiselula impiko zayo ukuthi igijime,
kumbe ugqokise intamo yalo ngomhlonga na?
Konela ukuthi likhale icilongo lihwabhe lithi, ‘Aha!’
kuthi lapho okulokubuleweyo khona lalo lukhona.”

name: Psalms
chapters: futhi unakana ngomthetho wakhe imini lobusuku.
bemelana loThixo njalo lalowo ogcotshiweyo wakhe besithi;
Oh Thixo banengi kangaka abayizitha zami!
Kodwa wena uyisihlangu sokungivikela, Oh, Thixo,
Sengathi isibusiso Sakho singaba sebantwini Bakho.
ubusuku bonke umbheda wami uba manzi te ngikhala
ayanqundeka ngenxa yazo zonke izitha zami.
Xekani kimi lina lonke elenza okubi,
UThixo usekuzwile ukukhala kwami ngicela umusa;
Oh Thixo, Nkulunkulu wami, nxa ngikwenzile lokhu
nxa ngenze okubi kulowo ohlalisene kuhle lami
loba ngisuke ngaphanga isitha sami kungelasizatho,
nxa kunjalo akuthi isitha sami singihlasele;
Ngahlulele, Oh Thixo ngokwanele ukulunga kwami,
uNkulunkulu obonisa ulaka lwakhe insuku zonke.
lesihluku sakhe sehlela phezu kwekhanda lakhe.
Ngizakudumisa, Oh Thixo, ngenhliziyo yami yonke;
usesimisile isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi ukuze ahlulele.
Labo abalaziyo ibizo lakho bazathemba kuwe,
Ngoba yena ophindiselayo kulowo ochitha igazi uyakhumbula;
Oh Thixo, ake ubone ukuthi izitha zami zingichukuluza njani!
akuthi izizwe zikwazi ukuthi zingabantu nje.
Koze kube nini, Oh Thixo? Uzangikhohlwa lanininini na?
Koze kube nini ungifihlela ubuso bakho na?
Koze kube nini ngitshukumisana lemicabango yami,
inhliziyo yami ihlale idabukile insuku zonke na?
Koze kube nini isitha sami sitshakala phezu kwami?
Ngizwela ungiphendule, Oh Thixo Nkulunkulu wami.
Khanyisela amehlo ami funa ngihle ngilale kokuphela;
Kodwa Ilizwi lazo lizwakala emhlabeni wonke,
Sengathi amazwi omlomo wami leminakano yenhliziyo yami
Oh Thixo, Dwala lami loMhlengi wami.
ngoba wenza isisekelo sawo phezu kolwandle
Ngubani ongema endaweni yakhe engcwele na?
abadinga ubuso Bakho, Oh Nkulunkulu kaJakhobe.
Khumbula, Oh Thixo, isihawu Sakho esikhulu kanye lothando,
ngoba nguye kuphela ozakhumula inyawo zami esithiyweni.
Ake ubone ukuthi izitha zami sezande kangakanani,
ngoba uthando Lwakho luhlezi luphambi kwami,
bese ngilizungeza i-alithari Lakho, Oh Thixo,
Ngiyayithanda indlu ohlala kuyo, Oh Thixo,
indawo lapho inkazimulo Yakho ehlala khona.
impilo yami kanye lalabo abomele igazi,
ngoba ukuzwile ukukhala kwami ngicela umusa.
Sindisa abantu Bakho ubusise ilifa lakho;
awaze wavumela izitha zami zijabule phezu kwami.
kodwa umusa wakhe ukhona okwempilo yonke;
Ngathi lapho ngizizwa ngihlezi kuhle ngathi,
kodwa kwathi lapho usufihle ubuso Bakho
Zwana, Oh Thixo, ube lomusa kimi;
kodwa ugxilise inyawo zami endaweni ebanzi.
Woba lomusa kimi, Oh Thixo, ngoba ngiyahlupheka;
amandla ami ayadeda ngenxa yokuhlupheka kwami,
ngoba watshengisa uthando lwakhe olumangalisayo kimi
Kanti wakuzwa ukukhala kwami ngicela umusa,
akuthi bonke abantu bomhlaba bazithobe phambi Kwakhe.
Kodwa amacebo kaThixo ami aqinile nini lanini,
loba lona lilamandla amakhulu ngeke lisindise.
kulabo othemba labo lisethandweni lwakhe olungapheliyo,
Sengathi uthando Lwakho olungaphuthiyo, Thixo, lungaba phezu kwethu
size sehluleke ukubona kumbe ukuzonda isono saso.
Oh Thixo, uyamlondoloza umuntu kanye lenyamazana.
ubuqotho balokho okulwelayo njengelanga lemini enkulu.
ungakhathazeki nxa abantu bephumelela ngezindlela zabo,
kodwa labo abathemba uThixo bazakudla ilifa lelizwe.
ngoba iyazi ukuthi usuku lwabo luyeza.
Kodwa izinkemba zabo zizagwaza ezabo inhliziyo,
labo uThixo ababusisayo bazakudla ilifa lelizwe;
kubo kumbe balahlwe licala nxa bethonisiswa.
kunjalo umphefumulo wami uyakunxwanela, Oh Nkulunkulu.
Umphefumulo wami womela uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu ophilayo.
lapho abantu besithi kimi ilanga lonke,
Kungani wephukile na, wena mphefumulo wami?
Kungani wephukile na, wena mphefumulo wami?
nxa ngivuma inkondlo yami ngiyihayela inkosi;
Hloma inkemba yakho okhalweni, wena omkhulu;
akuthi isandla sakho sokunene senze izimanga.
Akuthi imitshoko yakho ecijileyo icibe inhliziyo zezitha zenkosi;
akuthi izizwe ziwe ngaphansi kwezinyawo zakho.
Kukhona umfula ozifudlana zawo zithokozisa idolobho likaNkulunkulu,
Wazehlula zonke izizwe zaba ngaphansi kwethu,
hlabelelani indumiso eNkosini yethu, hlabelelani indumiso.
uNkulunkulu uhlezi esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi esingcwele.
amazwi aphuma enhliziyweni yami azanika ukuzwisisa.
Ngingesabelani na nxa kufika insuku ezimbi,
Phela bonke bayabona ukuthi izihlakaniphi ziyafa;
lokuba nje basebeqambe iziqinti ngamabizo abo.
Kodwa umuntu, lokuba elenotho, kaphili kokuphela;
Kodwa uNkulunkulu uzayihlenga eyami impilo engcwabeni;
Ungasuki udangale kakhulu ngokubona omunye enotha;
Akuthi ububi bubuyele phezu kwalabo abangigconayo;
ngizalidumisa ibizo lakho, Thixo, ngoba lihle.
lamehlo ami akubonile ukunqotshwa kwezitha zami.
ngoba ububi buthe khoxo phakathi kwabo.
Lina babusi, kambe likhuluma okuqondileyo na?
Hatshi, ezinhliziyweni zenu lakha amacebo okubusa kubi,
Khumula amazinyo emilonyeni yazo, awu Nkulunkulu;
nxa sebegeza inyawo zabo egazini lababi.
Ususilahlile, Oh Nkulunkulu, wabhidliza izinqaba zethu;
Kakusuwe na, Oh Nkulunkulu, wena osusilahlile,
Umphefumulo wami ufumana ukuphumula kuNkulunkulu kuphela;
Yena yedwa uyilo idwala lami lensindiso yami;
Koze kube nini lilokhu lihlukuluza umuntu na?
kuNkulunkulu kuphela; ithemba lami livela kuye.
Insindiso yami lodumo lwami kweyeme kuNkulunkulu;
Thembani kuye ngezikhathi zonke, lina bantu;
ukuthi amandla wonke ngawakho wena, Oh Nkulunkulu.
Sengathi uNkulunkulu angaba lomusa kithi asibusise
Sengathi bonke abantu bangakudumisa Oh Nkulunkulu;
ngoba umsinga wamanzi usugamenxe ngentamo yami.
ngoba ukutshisekela indlu yakho kufuthelene kimi,
loba umgodi uvaleke umlomo wawo phezu kwami.
Ngiphendula, Oh Thixo, ngenxa yokulunga kothando lwakho;
Sengathi itafula eliphambi kwabo lingaba ngumjibila;
Sengathi amehlo abo angafiphala ukuze bangaboni,
sengathi insindiso yakho, Oh Nkulunkulu ingangivikela.
okwedlula inkunzi yonke ilempondo lamangqina ayo.
Yikhona-ke abantu bazakwakha khona balithathe libe ngelabo;
abantwana bezinceku zayo lizakuba yilifa labo,
akuthi labo abathanda insindiso yakho bahlale besithi,
Ngoba ube ulithemba lami, Oh Thixo Wobukhosi,
Kusukela ekuzalweni kwami ngahle ngeyama kuwe;
Ngoba izitha zami zikhuluma kubi ngami;
woza masinyane, Oh Nkulunkulu wami, uzongisiza.
Kusukela ebutsheni bami, Oh Nkulunkulu, wangifundisa,
ngize ngifakaze ngamandla akho esizukulwaneni esizayo,
Ukulunga kwakho kufika emkhathini, Oh Nkulunkulu,
Ulimi lwami luzatshona lukhuluma ngokulunga kwakho
Yiphe inkosi ukwahlulela kwakho, Oh Nkulunkulu,
Uzakuba njengezulu lisina phezu kotshani obugundiweyo,
njalo kusukela eMfuleni kusiya emikhawulweni yomhlaba.
Sengathi ibizo lakhe lingema njalo laphakade,
kalibe khona lanini nxa lilokhu lisekhona ilanga.
Udumo alube kuye uThixo uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu ka-Israyeli,
Udumo kalube sebizweni lakhe elingcwele laphakade;
sengathi umhlaba wonke ungagcwala inkazimulo yakhe.
Lokhu yikho ukuphetha kwemikhuleko kaDavida indodana kaJese.
Kungani ususilahlile kokuphela na, awu Nkulunkulu?
Kungani ulaka lwakho luvutha phezu kwezimvu zedlelo lakho na?
incithakalo yonke le yenziwe yisitha endlini engcwele.
Izitha zakho zazibhonga endaweni owawuhlangana lathi kuyo;
Zatshisa indlu yakho engcwele yaphela nya;
Zatshisa zonke izindawo zokukhonzela uNkulunkulu elizweni.
Koze kube nini isitha sikuklolodela na, awu Nkulunkulu?
Izitha zizalithuka kokuphela ibizo lakho na?
Kungani ufinyeza isandla sakho sokunene na?
Kodwa wena Nkulunkulu uyiNkosi yami kwasekadeni;
sengathi abayanga labaswelayo bangalidumisa ibizo lakho.
khumbula ukuthi iziwula zikuhleka njani ilanga lonke.
siletha ukubonga, ngoba iBizo lakho liseduze;
Nxa umhlaba kanye labantu bawo kuzamazama,
Uthi ungakhwaza wena, Oh Nkulunkulu kaJakhobe,
ibhiza lenqola kuhle kulale phansi kuthi zwi.
Ngubani ongema phambi kwakho nxa usuthukuthele?
lapho wena, Oh Nkulunkulu, waphakama ukwahlulela,
Ngempela ulaka lwakho ebantwini lukulethela indumiso,
kuthi bonke abasilileyo elakeni lwakho bathotshiswe.
Yenzani izifungo kuThixo uNkulunkulu wenu lizigcwalise;
alethe izipho kuye Yedwa omele esatshwe.
yenza ubuso bakho bukhanye phambi kwethu,
koze kube nini ulaka lwakho luvutha
Ususenze saba yimbangela yengxabano kubomakhelwane bethu,
imisedari emikhulu yathi silikici ngamagatsha alo.
ukuze bonke abedlulayo baziqhululele izithelo zalo?
Yeyamisa isandla sakho emuntwini ongakwesokunene kwakho,
Zwanini, awu bantu bami, mina ngizalixwayisa
Labo abamzondayo uThixo bangatshotshobala phambi kwakhe,
Kodwa lina lingaphiwa ingqoloyi enhle kakhulu;
Umphefumulo wami uyalangazela, uze ungathi uyaphela,
Oh Thixo Somandla, Nkosi yami loNkulunkulu wami.
ngulowo lalowo aze aqhamuke kuNkulunkulu eZiyoni.
Zwana umkhuleko wami, Oh Thixo Nkulunkulu Somandla;
Sivuselele njalo, Oh Nkulunkulu Msindisi wethu,
Uzalugcina ulaka lwakho kuzozonke izizukulwane na?
Sitshengise uthando lwakho olungaphuthiyo, Oh Thixo,
uthembisa abantu bakhe ukuthula, abangcwele bakhe
ukuze inkazimulo yakhe ihlale elizweni lethu.
phendula indlebe yakho izwe ukukhala kwami.
amehlo ami asebona kalufifi ngenxa yosizi.
Kambe labo asebefile bangavuka bakudumise na?
Izimanga zakho ziyaziwa yini endaweni yobumnyama,
kumbe izenzo zakho zokulunga elizweni lokungabikho na?
Kodwa ngikhala kuwe ngoncedo, Oh Thixo;
Kusukela ebutsheni bami ngavele ngahlupheka ngaba seduze lokufa;
kusukela phakade kuze kube phakade unguNkulunkulu.
izono zethu zensitha wazichaya ekukhanyeni kobukhona bakho.
Zonke insuku zethu ziyedlula ngaphansi kolaka lwakho;
Ubude bezinsuku zethu buyiminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa
ngoba iphanga yedlule, lathi siphaphe nje sedlule.
Ngubani owaziyo amandla olaka lwakho na?
Ngoba intukuthelo yakho inkulu njengokwesatshwa okukufaneleyo.
Phola, Oh Thixo! Koze kube nini kulokhu kunjalo na?
ukuze sihlabelele ngentokozo sijabule zonke insuku zethu.
Senze sijabule okwensuku ezilingana ukusihlupha kwakho,
okwensuku ezilingana lalezo esesabona ngazo ukudubeka.
Sengathi imisebenzi yakho ingatshengiswa ezincekwini zakho,
Sengathi umusa weNkosi uNkulunkulu wethu ungehlela kithi;
ukuthembeka kwakhe kuzakuba yisihlangu sakho lenqaba yakho.
Ngoba uyangijabulisa ngezenzo zakho, Oh Thixo;
Mikhulu kangaka imisebenzi yakho, Oh Thixo,
Ngoba ngempela izitha zakho, Oh Thixo,
Amehlo ami abonile ukwehlulwa kwezitha zami;
indlebe zami zizwile ngokuchithizwa kwezitha zami ezimbi.
Bazabe belokhu bethela izithelo lanxa sebebadala,
kasihlokomeni kamnandi kulo iDwala lokusindiswa kwethu.
lingazenzi lukhuni inhliziyo zenu njengoba lenzenjalo eMeribha,
ukulunga lokwahlulela kuhle kuyisisekelo sesihlalo Sakhe sobukhosi.
Ngoba wena, Oh Thixo ungoPhezukonke kuwo wonke umhlaba;
Akuthi bonke abamthandayo, uThixo, bazonde okubi,
isandla sakhe sokunene lengalo yakhe engcwele
Akuthi ulwandle luhlokome, lakho konke okuphakathi kwalo,
bagcina izimiso zakhe lezimemezelo azitshoyo kubo.
lanxa wabajezisa ngenxa yezenzo zabo ezimbi.
Ngoba uThixo ulungile lothando lwakhe lumi kuze kube phakade;
ukukhala kwami ngicela uncedo kakufike kuwe.
labo abangichothozayo badlala ngebizo lami njengesethuko.
Kodwa wena, Oh Thixo, uhlezi ebukhosini lanininini;
Ngoba amatshe ayo aligugu ezincekwini zakho;
wonke amakhosi omhlaba azahlonipha inkazimulo yakhe.
Lokhu kakulotshwe phansi kube ngokwesizukulwane sakusasa,
“UThixo wakhangela phansi ephezulu endlini yakhe engcwele,
iminyaka yakho ihlala ikhona ezizukulwaneni zonke.
Abantwana bezinceku zakho bazahlala besemehlweni akho;
UThixo uzakwelula intonga yakhe elamandla eyobukhosi kusuka eZiyoni
izawachoboza amakhosi mhla wosuku lokuthukuthela kwayo.
lokulunga Kwakhe kumi kuze kube laphakade.
Ubatshengisile abantu bakhe amandla emisebenzi yakhe,
bonke abalandela iziqondiso zakhe balokuzwisisa okuhle.
Ubuhle buzakwehlela kuye ophanayo loweboleka ekhululekile,
Uhlakazele izipho zakhe kubayanga ezindaweni zonke,
Yenzele okuhle inceku yakho ukuba ngiphile;
Ngifundisa, Oh Thixo; ukulandela izimemezelo zakho;
Ngipha ukuzwisisa ukuze ngigcine umthetho wakho
Phendula amehlo ami asuke ezintweni ezingesilutho;
Sengathi uthando lwakho olungaphuthiyo lungeza kimi, Oh Thixo,
ngoba ithemba lami ngilibeke emithethweni yakho.
Ngizaphakamisa izandla zami emilayweni yakho engiyithandayo,
Induduzo yami phakathi kokuhlupheka kwami yile:
Ngiyayikhumbula imithetho yakho yekadeni, Oh Thixo,
Izimemezelo zakho ziyiyo injongo yengoma yami
Ebusuku ngiyalikhumbula ibizo lakho, Oh Thixo,
Ngiyabudinga ubuso bakho ngenhliziyo yami yonke;
ngaphendula izinyathelo zami zaya ezimisweni zakho.
Umhlaba ugcwele uthando lwakho, Oh Thixo;
ngiyazigcina izimiso zakho ngenhliziyo yami yonke.
Umthetho ophuma emlonyeni wakho uligugu kimi
ngipha ukuzwisisa ukuze ngifunde imilayo yakho.
Sengathi labo abakwesabayo bangathokoza nxa bengibona,
ngoba sengibeke ithemba lami elizwini lakho.
Ngiyazi, Thixo, ukuthi imithetho yakho ilungile,
Sengathi uthando lwakho olungaphuthiyo lungaba yinduduzo kimi,
Isihawu sakho kasize kimi ukuze ngiphile,
Sengathi abaklolodayo bangayangiswa ngokungigcona ngingonanga lutho;
Sengathi inhliziyo yami ingaba msulwa ngezimiso zakho,
Umphefumulo wami uyacikizeka ngokulangazelela insindiso yakho,
kodwa ngilibekile ithemba lami elizwini lakho.
Amehlo ami aseze efiphala ngokulinda isithembiso sakho;
Lanxa nginjengesixaxa sewayini esesikhumba sifuswe entuthwini,
Inceku yakho izalinda kuze kube nini na?
Ilizwi lakho, Oh Thixo, kalipheli lanini;
Aluba umthetho wakho ubungesiyo injabulo yami
Inyawo zami kaziyinyathelanga layiphi indlela embi
ngakho ngiyayizonda loba layiphi indlela engalunganga.
Inhliziyo yami izimisele ukugcina imilayo yakho
ukuze ngikwazi ukugcina imilayo kaNkulunkulu wami!
Uyabalahla bonke labo abaphambuka ezimisweni zakho,
Bonke ababi bomhlaba uyabalahlela kude njengezibi;
Amehlo ami asefiphala elokhu ekhangele insindiso yakho,
Sekuyisikhathi sakho sokuthi wenze okwakho, Oh Thixo
njalo njengoba ngisithi imithetho yakho ilungile,
njengoba uhlezi ukwenza kwabathanda ibizo lakho.
Yenza ubuso bakho bukhanye encekwini yakho,
ngoba izitha zami kaziwananzi amazwi akho.
ngiphendula, Thixo, mina ngizalalela imithetho yakho.
Ngivuka emathathakusa ngikhale kuwe ngicela usizo;
Amehlo ami alala ekhangele ngemilindo yonke yobusuku,
Zwana ilizwi lami ngokuya kothando lwakho;
londoloza impilo yami, Oh Thixo ngokuya kwemithetho yakho.
londoloza impilo yami mayelana lemithetho yakho.
Ake ubone ukuthi ngiyithanda kanganani imithetho yakho;
londoloza impilo yami, Oh Thixo, ngokothando lwakho.
kodwa inhliziyo yami iyaliqhuqhela ilizwi lakho.
Kukhulu ukuthula abalakho labo abathanda umthetho wakho,
Sengathi ukukhala kwami kungafika kuwe, Oh Thixo
Sengathi indebe zami zingageleza indumiso yakho,
Sengathi ulimi lwami lungalihlabela ilizwi lakho,
Kulapho okumi khona izihlalo zobukhosi ezokwahlulela,
Sengathi kungaba lokuthula ngaphakathi kwemiduli yakho
yona enganyikinyekiyo, emi kuze kube laphakade.
Yenza okuhle, awu Thixo, kulabo abalungileyo,
unjalo umphefumulo wami uthule ngaphakathi kwami.
Oh, Israyeli, beka ithemba lakho kuThixo
Phakama, Oh Thixo, ubuye endaweni yakho yokuphumula,
wena umtshokotsho wesivumelwano elitshengisa amandla akho.
aluba amadodana akho egcina isivumelwano sami
lapho-ke amadodana abo azahlala esihlalweni sakho
labathembekileyo bakhe bazahlabelela ngentokozo nini lanini.
Ngoba lapho uThixo wehlisela isibusiso sakhe,
Uthando lwakhe lumi kuze kube laphakade.
Kodwa wakhukhulela uFaro lempi yakhe eLwandle oluBomvu,
ngoba khonapho abathumbi bethu bacela izingoma kithi,
isandla sami sokunene kasilahlekelwe yibungcitshi baso.
Sengathi ulimi lwami lunganamathela elwangeni lomlomo wami
ubusisiwe lowo okuphindiselayo ngalokho okwenzileyo kithi.
Uyananzelela ukuphuma kwami lokulala phansi kwami;
Ngingaya ngaphi ngisuke eMoyeni wakho na?
amehlo akho awubona umzimba wami ungakabi lesimo.
Zonke insuku ezamiselwa mina zabhalwa encwadini yakho
Iligugu elinganani kimi imicabango yakho, Oh Nkulunkulu!
Ngithi nxa ngivuka ngibe ngilokhu ngilawe.
Kangibazondi yini abakuzondayo na Oh, Thixo,
Ngihlola, Oh Nkulunkulu, uyazi inhliziyo yami;
ngizama ukuze wazi ukunqineka kwemicabango yami.
Ake ubone ingabe kulendledlana embi kimi,
Oh Thixo, ngiyakubiza; woza masinyane kimi.
Sengathi umkhuleko wami ungema phambi kwakho njengempepha;
kuthi ukuphakama kwezandla zami kube njengomhlatshelo wakusihlwa.
Ngibekela umlindi womlomo wami, Oh Thixo,
Ikanti umkhuleko wami uhlezi umelana lezenzo zezigangi.
lababi bazafunda ukuthi amazwi ami ayekhulunywe kuhle.
kanjalo amathambo ethu achithiziwe emlonyeni weliba.”
Kodwa amehlo ami agxile kuwe, Oh Thixo woBukhosi;
ngiphakamisela ilizwi lami kuThixo ngicela umusa.
Lapho umphefumulo wami uncipha ngaphakathi kwami,
ngoba kakho ophilayo ongabe ulungile kuwe.
Kanjalo umphefumulo wami uyaphela ngaphakathi kwami;
ngidla ingqondo ngayo yonke imisebenzi yakho
Akuthi ukusa kungilethele ilizwi lothando lwakho olungaphuthiyo,
Ngenxa yebizo lakho, Oh Thixo, londoloza impilo yami;
Ethandweni lwakho olungaphuthiyo, thulisa izitha zami;
ngizalidumisa ibizo lakho kuze kube phakade.
ngibabaze ibizo lakho kuze kube phakade.
Umkhulu uThixo njalo ufanele kakhulu ukudunyiswa;
Yileso laleso isizukulwane sizababaza imisebenzi yakho kwesinye;
Sizakhuluma ngenkazimulo yakho ebenyezelayo ubukhosi bakho,
lami ngizazidla ingqondo ngemisebenzi yakho emangalisayo.
kuze kuthi bonke abantu bazi ngezenzo zakho ezinkulu
wena ubaphe ukudla kwabo ngesikhathi esifaneleyo.
Akuthi izidalwa zonke zidumise ibizo lakhe elingcwele
Kuhle kangakanani ukuhlabela indumiso kuNkulunkulu wethu,
INkosi yethu inkulu, njalo makhulu amandla ayo;
loba injabulo yakhe ekuqineni kwemilenze yomuntu;
ababeka ithemba labo ethandweni lwakhe olungaphuthiyo.
Ngubani ongamelana lomfutho wakhe olomqando na?
lina zidalwa zasolwandle lezinziki zalo zonke,
mdumiseni ngenxa yobukhulu bakhe obudlula konke.

name: Proverbs
chapters: ungawakhohlwa amazwi ami, kumbe ugudluke kuwo.
Zuza ukuqedisisa loba kungathatha konke olakho.
Kuzakwethesa umqhele wamaluba omusa ekhanda lakho
ukuze insuku zokuphila kwakho zibe zinengi.
badela ubuthongo ukuze baqale balimaze omunye umuntu.
kukhule ukukhanya kwalo kuze kuphelele emini.
Kodwa indlela yababi ifana lomnyama omkhulu;
Phezu kwakho konke, gcina inhliziyo yakho,
uwathi nhlo amehlo akho kulokho okuphambi kwakho.
Lungisa izindlela ukuze inyawo zakho zinyathele kuhle,
izindlela zaso ziyazombeleza, kodwa kasikuboni lokho.
funa unikele kwabanye amandla akho wonke
lokusebenza kwakho kunothise umuzi wenye indoda.
lapho inyama yakho lomzimba wakho sekugugile.
njalo sengathi ungathokoza ngomfazi wobutsha bakho.
amabele akhe sengathi angakusuthisa lanini, nini lanini
Kungani ugona iqolo lomfazi wenye indoda?
ulinde imfundiso yami njengegugu lakho elikhulu.
khathesi nangu emgwaqweni, njalo nangu enkundleni,
ngakho kayibuyi kuze kube phakathi kwenyanga.”
Ngamazwi akhe amnandi waledukisa ijaha lelo;
Umuntu omubi angafa ithemba lakhe liyaphela;
Ngomlomo wakhe umuntu ongakholwayo uyamchitha umakhelwane,
kodwa umuntu ozwisisayo uthiba ulimi lwakhe.
Lowo okhuphela omunye umuntu isibambiso uzahlupheka,
kodwa amadoda alesihluku azuza inotho kuphela.
kodwa lowo ohlanyela ukulunga uvuna umvuzo omuhle.
kodwa uyathokoza ngalabo abandlela zabo zilungile.
kodwa izibusiso zingumqhele walowo ovuma ukuwathengisa.
Olethela abendlu yakhe uhlupho ilifa lakhe yize,
kodwa uThixo uyamlahla owakha amacebo amabi.
kodwa umfazi oyangisayo unjengokubola kwamathambo akhe.
Abantu ababi bayachithwa bangabe besaba khona,
Lowo osebenza nzima emasimini akhe uzathola ukudla okunengi,
kodwa lowo ophika ngezifiso eziyize akalangqondo.
Umuntu omubi uthiyeka ngenkulumo yakhe yesono,
Umuntu uzuza okuhle ngamazwi omlomo wakhe,
kodwa umuntu olengqondo kananzi loba ethukwa.
kodwa ulimi olulamanga luma umzuzwana nje.
kodwa umuntu okhutheleyo uyazibula ngenotho yakhe.
Umuntu uzuza okuhle ngamazwi omlomo wakhe,
Lowo olinda izindebe zakhe ulinda impilo yakhe,
kodwa lowo osuka abhede nje uyazibulala.
omunye azitshaye umyanga, kanti elenotho enengi.
Wonke umuntu ohlakaniphileyo wenza konke ngolwazi,
Umuntu olungileyo utshiyela izizukulwane sakhe ilifa,
Lowo ongasebenzisi uswazi uyayizonda indodana yakhe,
kodwa lowo oyisiwula uyayibhidliza ngezandla zakhe.
kodwa lowo ondlela zakhe zigobile uyameyisa.
kodwa amandla enkabi aletha isivuno esinengi.
Ukuhlakanipha kwabaqondayo yikuthi bayacabanga ngalokho abakwenzayo,
Inhliziyo leyo laleyo iyakwazi ukudabuka kwayo,
Umuntu ohlakaniphileyo uyamesaba uThixo, axwaye okubi,
kodwa isiwula siliphikankani kodwa sizizwa sivikelekile.
Abantu ababi bazilahla phansi phambi kwabalungileyo,
Kodwa abamisa ukwenza okuhle bafumana uthando lokuthembeka.
Lowo oncindezela abayanga weyisa uMenzi wabo,
Kungcono ukutsheba ngemibhida lapho okulothando khona,
kulokudla inyama enonileyo okugcwele khona inzondo.
kodwa umuntu olokuzwisisa uhamba ngendlela eqondileyo.
yeka kuhle kangakanani ukuzwa ilizwi elifaneleyo!
Lowo onganaki ukulaywa uyazeyisa yena ngokwakhe,
kodwa uThixo nguye omupha amazwi okuwachaza.
Umuntu angabona sengathi zonke izindlela zakhe ziqondile,
kodwa uThixo uyazihlolisisa zonke injongo zomuntu.
uyenza lezitha zakhe zihlalisane laye ngokuthula.
Umuntu angalungisa indlela yakhe engqondweni yakhe,
kodwa uThixo nguye olawula izinyathelo zakhe.
ngoba isihlalo sobukhosi sakhelwe phezu kokulunga.
Nxa ubuso benkosi bulentokozo, kukhomba ukuphila;
lowo onanzelelayo indlela yakhe unanzelela impilo yakhe.
Inhliziyo yomuntu ohlakaniphileyo ikhokhela umlomo wakhe,
Lowo ofica ngelihlo lakhe uceba izibozi;
lowo oluma indebe zakhe uqonde ububi.
umuntu ozinqandayo ulaka lwakhe kulalowo othumba idolobho.
Lowo ohleka umyanga weyisa uMenzi wakhe;
zimbi kangakanani ke izindebe zamanga kumbusi!
lowo owakha isango eliphakemeyo udinga ukubhidlizwa.
lowo olimi lwakhe luyakhohlisa uwela ekuhluphekeni.
kodwa amehlo esiwula asabalala afike ekucineni komhlaba.
loba ukufaka uswazi izisebenzi ngenxa yobuqotho bazo.
Umuntu ololwazi ubeka amazwi akhe ngokunanzelela,
kuthiwe siyaqedisisa nxa sibamba ulimi lwaso.
kodwa umyanga ufulathelwa ngumngane wakhe weduze.
njalo wonke umuntu ngumngane walowo ophanayo.
pho abangane bakhe bona bamnina kangakanani!
Lowo ozuze ukuhlakanipha uthanda umphefumulo wakhe;
kubi kangakanani ukuthi isigqili sibuse amakhosana.
Lowo olalela izeluleko uvikela impilo yakhe,
Qondisa indodana yakho, ngoba lokho kuzayisiza;
Thela uswazi isideleli, abathobekileyo bazafunda ukuhlakanipha;
Nxa uyekela ukulandela izeluleko, ndodana yami,
kodwa iziphukuphuku zonke ziphangisa ukuthenga inkani.
kodwa ngubani ongamthola umuntu othembekileyo na?
Inkosi nxa ihlezi esihlalweni sayo isahlulela,
Thatha isembatho salowo owenzela owezizweni isibambiso;
Nxa umuntu ethuka uyise loba unina,
Pho umuntu angayazi kanjani na indlela yakhe?
Ndodana yami, aluba inhliziyo yakho ihlakaniphile,
Ngizavuka nini bo ngiyodinga obunye utshwala?”
Njengokuziquma inyawo zakho loba ukunatha itshefu,
unjalo oqhatsha isiwula loba umuntu ozedlulelayo.
unjalo umuntu othi edlula angenele ingxabano ingesiyakhe.
unjalo umuntu othanda ingxabano ekuvuseni inkani.
Umuntu olenhliziyo embi uvala ngezindebe ezimnandi,
ngoba inhliziyo yakhe igcwele izithuko eziyisikhombisa.
kodwa ububi bakhe buzavezwa obala ebantwini.
Ulimi oluqamba amanga luyabazonda labo olubalimazayo,
Yekela omunye akudumise, hatshi owakho umlomo;
kodwa ukucatshulwa yisiwula kunzima okudlula kokubili.
kambe ngubani ongema phambi komhawu na?
lobumnandi bomngane busuka ezelulekweni zakhe eziqinileyo.
futhi ungayi endlini yomfowenu nxa wehlelwe yizinhlupheko
Hlakanipha, ndodana, ulethe intokozo enhliziyweni yami;
Umuntu olengqondo uthi ebona ingozi acatshe,
Thatha isigqoko salowo owenzela owemzini isibambiso;
sigcine njengesithembiso aluba esenzela umfazi ongelasimilo.
Uba umuntu evukisa umakhelwane wakhe ngokumnqolonga ekuseni kakhulu,
Lowo onakekela isihlahla somkhiwa uzakudla izithelo zawo,
kuthi lowo olondoloza umqhatshi wakhe abelodumo.
kanjalo inhliziyo yomuntu itshengisa ayikho khona.
Woba leqiniso ukuthi uhlala usazi kuhle isimo sezifuyo zakho,
lembuzi zikuphe imali elingana intengo yesiqinti.
olwakho lolwendlu yakho lusuthise lezinceku zakho.
Umuntu omubi uyabaleka loba engaxotshaniswa muntu,
Nxa ilizwe lihlamuka liba lababusi abanengi,
kodwa umuntu ozwisisayo lololwazi ugcina ukuthula.
kodwa labo abamdingayo uThixo bayakuzwisisa kakhulu.
kodwa umyanga oqedisisayo uhle abone ukuthi kasumuntu.
kodwa nxa omubi ethatha umbuso abantu bayacatsha.
kodwa lowo ozivumayo azitshiye ufumana umusa.
kodwa lowo oyenza lukhuni inhliziyo yakhe uwela enkathazweni.
unjalo umuntu omubi nxa ebusa abantu abangelamandla.
kodwa lowo ozonda inzuzo yokuganga uzakuba lempilo ende.
kodwa ondlela zakhe zixhwalile uzakuwa masinyane.
Lowo osebenza nzima emasimini akhe uzathola ukudla okunengi,
kodwa lowo ophika ngezifiso eziyize uzakuba ngumyanga onukayo.
ikanti umuntu uyona ukuze azuze ucezu lwesinkwa.
kodwa ovala amehlo ingathi kababoni uzuza iziqalekiso ezinengi.
Lapho izigangi zisiba yiziphathamandla abantu bayacatsha;
kodwa nxa kusifa izixhwali abalungileyo bayaphumelela.
Amazwi enkosi uLemuweli, amazwi enhlakanipho awafundiswa ngunina:
Oh, ndodana yami! Oh ndodana yethumbu lami!
behluleke ukumisela kuhle abahluphekayo amalungelo abo.
Lapho kukhithika ungqwaqwane, kalakwesaba ngabendlu yakhe;
lapho efika ihlale khona ndawonye labadala belizwe.

name: Ecclesiastes
chapters: Amazwi oMtshumayeli, indodana kaDavida inkosi yaseJerusalema:
Umuntu uzuzani ngawo wonke umsebenzi wakhe awusebenza nzima
liphinde liphange libuyele lapho eliphuma khona.
Lokho okwake kwaba khona kuzakuba khona njalo;
Ngazinikela ekufundeni lokudingisisa ngolwazi konke okwenziwayo ngaphansi kwezulu. Unzima kangakanani umthwalo uNkulunkulu awethese abantu!
Sengizibonile zonke izinto ezenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga; zonke kazitsho lutho, kuyikuxotshana lomoya.
Ngacabanga ngedwa ngathi, “Khangela, sengikhulile njalo kwanda ukuhlakanipha kwami okudlula bonke asebake babusa eJerusalema ngaphambi kwami; sengibe lakho ukuhlakanipha okukhulu lolwazi.”
Ngasengizimisela ukuzwisisa ukuhlakanipha, njalo lokuphambana ingqondo lobuwula, kodwa ngafunda ukuthi lokhu lakho kuyikuxotshana lomoya.
Ngacabanga ngenhliziyo ngathi, “Kulungile, ake ngizame ukuzithokozisa ngibone ingabe kuhle yini.” Kodwa lokho lakho kwakhanya kuyize.

Ngazama ukuzithabisa ngewayini, ngisenza ubuwula kodwa ingqondo yami ilokhu ingikhokhela ngokuhlakanipha. Ngangifuna ukubona ukuthi kuyini okumlungeleyo umuntu ukuthi akwenze lapha ngaphansi kwezulu ngezinsukwana lezo zokuphila kwakhe.
Ngaqalisa imisebenzi emikhulu: ngazakhela izindlu ngahlanyela amavini.
Ngasungula izivande lezigcawu zokubukwa ngahlanyela kuzo yonke imihlobo yezihlahla lezithelo.
Ngenza iziziba zamanzi okuthelela izihlahla ezazikhula kuhle.
Ngathenga izigqili zesilisa lezesifazane, ngilezinye futhi izigqili ezazalelwa emzini wami. Ngaba lemihlambihlambi yenkomo lezimvu okwedlula bonke abake babakhona eJerusalema ngaphambi kwami.
Ngabuthelela isiliva legolide, kanye lempahla yamakhosi eligugu ivela ezigodini. Ngazidingela abahlabeleli besilisa labesifazane, lesithembo esikhulu, khona okujabulisa inhliziyo yendoda.
Ngaba mkhulu ngokwedluleyo kulaloba ngubani owaba seJerusalema ngaphambi kwami. Phakathi kwayo yonke inyakanyaka le ukuhlakanipha kwami kwahlala kukhona.
Inhliziyo yami yathokoza ngawo wonke umsebenzi wami,
Kanti lanxa ngahlolisisa konke okwenziwa yizandla zami
Yikho-ke ngasengikuzonda ukuphila, ngoba umsebenzi owenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga wawubuhlungu kimi. Wonke uyize, yikuxotshana lomoya.
Ngazizonda zonke izinto engangiziginqele ngaphansi kwelanga, ngoba ngimele ngitshiyele lowo oza ngemva kwami.
Njalo ngubani owaziyo ingabe uzakuba ngumuntu ohlakaniphileyo loba isiwula? Kodwa nguye ozalawula wonke umsebenzi wamaginqo ami lobungcitshi bami. Lokhu lakho kuyize.
Ngalokho inhliziyo yami yaqalisa ukuphela amandla ngikhumbula konke lokho engakuginqelayo ngaphansi kwelanga.
Ngoba umuntu angenza umsebenzi wakhe ngokuhlakanipha, ngolwazi langamasu, kodwa utshiyela konke alakho komunye ongazange akusebenzele. Lokhu lakho kuyize, kungumnyama.
Umuntu uzuzani ngakho konke ukusebenza nzima langokutshikatshika kabuhlungu lapha emhlabeni?
Ubuhlungu umsebenzi wakhe awenzayo kuzozonke insuku zokuphila kwakhe; kwala kanye lebusuku umkhumbulo wakhe kawuphumuli. Lokhu lakho kuyize.
Akukho okungcono emuntwini ngaphandle kokuthi adle, anathe njalo azuze ukusuthiseka ngomsebenzi wakhe. Lokhu lakho ngiyakubona ukuthi kuvela kuNkulunkulu,
ngoba ngaphandle kwakhe ngubani ongadla kumbe azuze intokozo?

Kulowo omthokozisayo uNkulunkulu umupha ukuhlakanipha, ulwazi lokuthaba, kodwa koyisoni umupha umsebenzi wokuqoqa lokulonda inotho ukuze ayiphe lowo othokozisa uNkulunkulu. Lokhu lakho kuyize, yikuxotshana lomoya.
konke okwenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga kulesibanga sakho:
Umuntu osebenzayo uzuzani na ngokusadalala kwakhe?
Yonke into uyenze yabanhle ngesikhathi sayo. Wamupha umuntu iphakade enhliziyweni yakhe; kodwa abantu bangeke bafinyelele kulokho uNkulunkulu asakwenzayo kwasekuqaleni kusiya ekupheleni.
Ngiyakwazi ukuthi kakukho okungcono ebantwini kulokuthi bajabule njalo benze okuhle besaphila.
Ukuthi wonke umuntu adle, anathe asuthiseke ekusebenzeni kwakhe gadalala, lokhu kuyisipho sikaNkulunkulu.
Ngiyazi yonke into eyenziwa nguNkulunkulu izakuba khona kokuphela; akulalutho olungengezwa kukho loba kususwe kukho. UNkulunkulu uyenza lokho ukuze abantu bamkhonze.
Loba yini ekhona seyake yaba khona,
kulalokho okuzakuba khona sekwaba khona ngaphambili;
ngoba sizaba khona isikhathi sezenzakalo zonke,
Ngacabanga njalo ngathi, “UNkulunkulu uyabahlola abantu ukuze babone ukuthi banjengezinyamazana.

Isiphetho somuntu siyafana lesezinyamazana; isiphetho sinye sibalindele bonke: njengoba lokhu kuyafa, kanjalo lokunye kuyafa. Konke kokubili kulomphefumulo munye; umuntu kangcono kulenyamazana. Konke kuyize.
Konke kuya ndawo yinye; konke kuvela othulini, yikho konke kubuyela othulini.
Ngubani owaziyo ingabe umphefumulo womuntu uyakhwela uye phezulu kuthi owenyamazana wehlele phansi phakathi emhlabathini?”

Yikho ngabona ukuthi kakukho okungcono emuntwini ngaphandle kokuthi akholise umsebenzi wakhe ngoba leso yiso isabelo sakhe. Ngoba kambe ngubani ongamenza ukuthi abone lokho okuzakwenzakala yena esedlule?
Ngakhangela njalo ngabona konke ukuncindezelwa okwakukhona ngaphansi kwelanga:
Ngasengibona ukuthi konke ukusebenza lokuphumelela konke kuvela emhawini womuntu ngomakhelwane wakhe. Lokhu lakho kuyize, kuyikuxotshana lomoya.
Njalo ngabona okunye okuyize ngaphansi kwelanga:
kodwa amehlo ayo ayengasuthiswa yinotho yayo.
Njalo nxa ababili belala ndawonye bazakhudumezana.
Kanti umuntu angakhudumala kanjani eyedwa na?
Lingcono ijaha elingumyanga kodwa lihlakaniphile kulenkosi endala eyisiwula eyalayo ukwamukela izixwayiso.
Ijaha lelo kungabe ngeliphuma ejele libe yinkosi, loba lingelazalelwa ebuyangeni elizweni lalowombuso.
Ngabona ukuthi bonke ababephila behamba ngaphansi kwelanga balilandela lelojaha elathatha isikhundla sobukhosi.

Amakhosi la (endala lencinyane) kungabe ayelodumo elandelwa ngabantu abanengi abangelakubalwa. Kodwa izizukulwane ezilandelayo azimthandanga lowo owathatha ubukhosi. Lokhu lakho kuyize, yikuxotshana lomoya.
Ungaze wathi, “Kungani insuku zayizolo zazingcono kulalezi?”
ukuthi ukuhlakanipha kuyayilondoloza impilo yalowo olakho.
Kuyonale impilo yami eyize sengizibonile izinto lezi zombili:
lomuntu omubi uba lempilo enhle emubi enjalo.
Ukuhlakanipha kwenza umuntu ohlakaniphileyo oyedwa abe lamandla
Ungaphiki ngokulalela wonke amazwi akhulunywa ngabantu,
ngidingisise njalo ngichwayisise ukuhlakanipha kanye lesimo sezinto
Ngihlanganisa lokhu lalokhu ngizama ukubona isimo sezinto
kodwa ngitsho loyedwa umfazi oqondileyo kubo.
Ngithi hlonipha umlayo wenkosi ngoba wenza isifungo phambi kukaNkulunkulu.
Ungawalazeli ukusuka phambi kwenkosi. Ungalumeli ulutho nxa lungaqondanga ngoba yona ingenza loba yini eyithandayo.
Njengoba ilizwi lenkosi lingaphikiswa ngubani ongathi kuyo, “Kanti wenzani?”
Lowo ohlonipha imilayo yayo akayikwehlelwa ngokubi,
lenhliziyo ehlakaniphileyo iyasazi isikhathi lendlela yokwenza.
Ngoba into yonke ilesikhathi esiqondileyo lendlela yokwenza eqondileyo,
lanxa umuntu eyabe esindwa yizinkathazo zakhe.
Njengoba kungelamuntu olamandla phezu komoyo ovunguzayo
Akulamuntu olamandla phezu kosuku lwakhe lokufa.
kunjalo ukuxhwala akuyikubakhulula labo abaphila ngakho.
Konke lokhu ngakubona lapho ngangihlolisisa ngengqondo yami konke okwenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga. Kukhona isikhathi lapho umuntu aphatha khona abanye ngochuku kanti uyazilimaza yena.
Ngabona njalo ababi bengcwatshwa, labo ababehlala befika bahambe endaweni engcwele bazuze udumo kulelodolobho ababeganga khona. Khona lakho kuyize.
Nxa isigwebo secala singenziwanga masinyane, abantu basuka bacabange ukuqhubeka ngokuganga kwabo.
Loba umuntu ogangileyo engenza amacala alikhulu ajinge aphile okwesikhathi eside, ngiyazi ukuthi kuzakuba ngcono kulabo abamesabayo uNkulunkulu, abazithobayo kuNkulunkulu.
Kodwa ngenxa yokuthi izixhwali kazimesabi uNkulunkulu, kakuzukuzilungela, lezinsuku zazo kaziyukweluleka njengesithunzi.
Kukhona njalo enye into eyize eyenzakalayo emhlabeni: abantu abalungileyo abazuza okufanele ababi, labantu ababi abazuza okufanele abalungileyo. Ngithi lokhu lakho kudida ingqondo.

Ngakho-ke ngikhuthaza ukuzithokozisa empilweni ngoba kakukho okungcono emuntwini ngaphansi kwelanga kulokuzitika, unathe, uthokoze. Lapho-ke injabulo izahlala injalo kuye emsebenzini wakhe zonke insuku zokuphila kwakhe aziphiwe nguNkulunkulu lapha emhlabeni.
Ngathi ngibeka ingqondo yami ekwazini ukuhlakanipha lokunanzelela imisebenzi yabantu emhlabeni, umuntu engalali imini lobusuku,
ngasengibona konke uNkulunkulu akwenzileyo. Kakho ongaqedisisa okwenzakalayo ngaphansi kwelanga. Loba umuntu ohlakaniphileyo angazitshaya owaziyo, kodwa angeke akuqedisise.
Yikho ngakucabanga konke lokhu ngabona ukuthi abalungileyo labahlakaniphileyo labakwenzayo kusezandleni zikaNkulunkulu, kodwa kakho owaziyo ingabe ulindelwe luthando langabe yinzondo.
Bonke balesiphetho sinye, abaqondileyo labaxhwalileyo, abalungileyo lababi, abahlambulukileyo labangcolileyo, abenza imihlatshelo labangayenziyo.

Lobu yibo ububi obuvelela zonke izinto ngaphansi kwelanga: Konke kulesiphetho sinye. Njalo inhliziyo zabantu zigcwele izibozi futhi kulokubheda phakathi kwazo nxa besaphila, ikanti emva kwakho konke baya kwabafileyo.
Loba ngubani olethemba nxa esahlezi kwabaphilayo, yebo kambe phela inja ephilayo ingcono kulesilwane esifileyo!
Hamba nje uyezidlela ukudla kwakho uchelesile, unathe iwayini lakho ngenhliziyo emhlophe, ngoba uNkulunkulu usakuvumele okwamanje.
Gqoka ezimhlophe ngezikhathi zonke, ugcobe ikhanda lakho ngamafutha.

Kholisa impilo lomfazi wakho omthandayo kuzozonke insuku zale impilo eyize uNkulunkulu akunike yona ngaphansi kwelanga, zonke insuku zakho eziyize. Phela lesi yiso isabelo sakho empilweni phakathi kokutshikatshika kwakho ngaphansi kwelanga.
Lokho isandla sakho esingakwenza kwenze ngamandla akho wonke, ngoba engcwabeni lapho oya khona akusetshenzwa, akulakulungiselela, kakulalwazi kumbe ukuhlakanipha.
kodwa kuya ngesikhathi langenhlanhla kubani lobani.
Futhi kakho owaziyo ukuthi isikhathi sakhe sizafika nini:
Ngaphinda ngabona ngaphansi kwelanga lesisibonelo sokuhlakanipha esagxila engqondweni yami:
Kwake kwaba khona idolobho elincinyane elalilabantu abalutshwana kulo. Kwasuka inkosi elamandla yalihlasela, yalihonqolozela yakha amadundulu amakhulu okuvimbezela.
Kulelodolobho kwakuhlala indoda ethile engesulutho kodwa ihlakaniphile, ngakho yawusindisa umuzi lowo ngokuhlakanipha kwayo. Kodwa kakho loyedwa owaphinde wayikhumbula leyondoda eyayingebani.
Yikho-ke ngasengisithi, “Ukuhlakanipha kungcono kulamandla.” Kodwa ukuhlakanipha komuntukazana kuyeyiswa lamazwi akhe akasanakwa.
Njengoba impukane ezifele phakathi kwamakha ziwenza anuke kubi,
kunjalo lobuwula obuncinyane bugabhela ukuhlakanipha lodumo.
ngubani ongamazisa okuzakwenzakala ngemva kwakhe na?
Maye kuwe, wena lizwe onkosi yalo yayiyisichaka,
Ubusisiwe wena, wena lizwe onkosi yalo izalwa esikhosini
nxa izandla zayo ziyekethisa indlu iyavuza.
kodwa imali yiyo impendulo yakho konke.
loba uqalekise abanothileyo loba usendlini yakho yokulala,
ngoba mhlawumbe inyoni yasemoyeni ingawathwala amazwi akho,
ngoba ngemva kwensuku ezinengi uzasifumana futhi.
Nxa amayezi ethwele, anisa izulu emhlabathini.
Aluba isihlahla singawela eningizimu loba enhla,
uvumele inhliziyo yakho ikuthokozise ensukwini zobutsha bakho.
kodwa yazi ukuthi ngenxa yazo zonke lezizinto
UMtshumayeli wayehlakaniphile, njalo esabela abantu ulwazi. Wazidla ingqondo wadingisisa wamisa kuhle izaga ezinengi.
UMtshumayeli wadingisisa ukuze azuze amazwi ayiwonawona, kwathi-ke konke akulobayo kwaqonda njalo kuliqiniso.
Amazwi abahlakaniphileyo anjengenswazi zokwethusa izimvu, izitsho zabo eziqoqiweyo zinjengezipikili ezibethelwe zatshona, zivela kuMalusi munye.
Limuka, ndodana yami, loba kuyini okudlula lapho.
Ukulotshwa kwezincwadi ezinengi akulamkhawulo, njalo ukufunda kakhulu kuhlukuluza umzimba.
ngoba lo yiwo wonke umlandu womuntu.

name: Song of Solomon
chapters: lokuthi ziphumula ngaphi izimvu zakho emini?
Nxa ungazi, wena omuhle okudlula bonke abesifazane,
amakha ami enadi alanquza iphunga lawo elimnandi.
Kimi isithandwa sami sinjengelixha lempoko zehena
Isithandwa sami sinjengempala loba ithole lomziki.
Khangela! Nansiyana simi ngale komduli wakwethu,
Amazinyo akho anjengomhlambi wezimvu zisanda kugundwa,
zivela geziswa yileyo ihamba laleyo efanana layo;
Uyithumbile inhliziyo yami, dadewethu, mlobokazi wami;
Izindebe zakho ziconsa ubumnandi njengoluju, mlobokazi wami;
ukuze amakha aso agcwale indawo yonke.
Akuthi isithandwa sami size esivandeni saso
Sengingenile esivandeni sami, dadewethu, mlobokazi wami;
Isithandwa sami sangenisa isandla saso embotsheni yomnyango;
Isithandwa sakho singcono ngani kulezinye izithandwa
Lesi yiso isithandwa sami, yena umngane wami,
kodwa ijuba lami, opheleleyo wami, wehlukene,
isifiso sami sangibeka ezinqoleni zobukhosi ezabantu bakithi.

name: Isaiah
chapters: Umbono omayelana ngoJuda leJerusalema owabonwa ngu-Isaya indodana ka-Amozi ensukwini zokubusa kuka-Uziya, loJothamu, lo-Ahazi loHezekhiya amakhosi akoJuda.
Kusukela ngaphansi kwentende yonyawo lwakho kusiya esicholo sekhanda
ngubani othe linyathele amaguma ami na?
Susani izenzo zenu ezimbi phambi kobuso bami;
Fundani ukwenza okulungileyo; funani ukwahlulela okuhle.
sivumele kuphela nje ukuba sibizwe ngebizo lakho.
Ngalolosuku uGatsha lukaThixo luzakuba luhle lube yinkazimulo, lezithelo zelizwe zizakuba ligugu lenkazimulo kwabasindayo ko-Israyeli.
Labo abatshiywe eZiyoni, abasele eJerusalema, kuzathiwa bangcwele, labo bonke abalotshiweyo phakathi kwabaphilayo eJerusalema.
INkosi izagezisa ingcekeza yabesifazane baseZiyoni, izahlambulula amachatha egazi eJerusalema ngomoya wokwahlulela langomoya womlilo.

Lapho-ke, phezu kwayo yonke iNtaba iZiyoni langaphezulu kwabo bonke abahlangana khona, uThixo uzakwenza iyezi lentuthu emini, lokukhanya kwamalangabi omlilo ebusuku; ngaphezu kwenkazimulo yonke kuzakuba lesivikelo esinjengophahla.
Sizakuba yisisitho lomthunzi wokuvika ukutshisa kwemini, isiphephelo lendawo yokucatshela isiphepho lezulu.
Lizabalekela kubani ukuba lithole usizo na?
Akukho okuzasala, kodwa ukuba baquthe phakathi kwabathunjiweyo
Ikanti kukho konke lokhu, ukuthukuthela kwakhe akupheli,
Uthi, ‘Izinduna zami zebutho kazisimakhosi zonke na?
Lanjengoba isandla sami sabamba imibuso yezithombe,
imibuso ezifanekiso zayo zedlula ezeJerusalema lezeSamariya,
ngendlela engaphatha ngayo iSamariya lezithombe zayo na?’ ”
Lapho uThixo esewuqedile wonke umsebenzi wakhe mayelana lentaba iZiyoni leJerusalema uzakuthi, “Ngizayijezisa inkosi yase-Asiriya ngenxa yokuzigqaja kwayo lokuzazisa okubonakala emehlweni ayo.”
ngokunjalo isandla sami safinyelela enothweni yezizwe,
Konje ihloka liyaziphakamisela ngaphezu kwalowo olizulisayo na,
loba isaha izincome imelane lalowo oyisebenzisayo na?
kumbe isagila sinyikinye lowo ongasiso sigodo!
uzathumela isifo esicikizayo emabuthweni ayo aqinileyo;
Ubuhle bamahlathi akhe lamasimu akhe avundileyo,
Loba abantu bakho, we Israyeli, benjengetshebetshebe olwandle,
Ngakho-ke lokho yikho iNkosi, uThixo uSomandla akutshoyo:
njalo lawo aliphakamisela isagila njengokwenziwa yiGibhithe.
njalo uzaphakamisela intonga yakhe ngaphezu kwamanzi
Ngalolosuku imithwalo yabo izasuswa emahlombe enu,
uGatsha oluhlume empandeni zakhe luzathela izithelo.
loba aqume ngalokho akuzwa ngendlebe zakhe;
Ngalolosuku iMpande kaJese izakuma njengophawu ebantwini; izizwe zizabuthana kuye, indawo yakhe yokuphumula izakuba lodumo.

Ngalolosuku uThixo uzakwelula isandla sakhe okwesibili ukuba abuyise insalela zabantu bakhe abasala e-Asiriya, eGibhithe, ePhathrosi, eTiyopiya, eKhushi, e-Elamu, eShinari, eHamathi lasezihlengeni zolwandle.
Kuzakuba lomgwaqo omkhulu wezinsalela zabantu bakhe
Leli yilizwi elimayelana leBhabhiloni elaboniswa u-Isaya indodana ka-Amozi:
sengiwalayile amaqhawe ami ukuba afeze ulaka lwami,
Ngenxa yalokhu izandla zonke zizakuba buthakathaka,
Ngizakwenza abantu basweleke okudlula igolide elicengekileyo,
Izingane zabo zizamahlazelwa phambi kwamehlo abo;
izindlu zabo zizakhuthuzwa, omkabo babanjwe ngodlakela.
loba umelusi ozaphumuza imihlambi yakhe khona.
phezu kwezimpahla zezindlu lasezindaweni zabantu bonke,
ababalekayo bayo babaleka baze bayefika kude eZowari;
kodwa ngizajinge ngilethe okunengi phezu kweDimoni,
Lapho uMowabi evela endaweni yakhe ephakemeyo
Leli yilizwi uThixo avele eselikhulumile ngoMowabi.

Kodwa khathesi uThixo uthi: “Phakathi kweminyaka emithathu, njengesisebenzi esibotshwe yisivumelwano singayibala, udumo lukaMowabi labantu bakhe bonke abanengi kuzakweyiswa, njalo abazasinda bakhona bazakuba balutshwana kakhulu njalo bengelamandla.”
Kuzakuba njengalapho umvuni evuna amabele amiyo
wabo amehlo abo aphendukele koNgcwele ka-Israyeli.
Ngalolosuku amadolobho abo aqinileyo, abawatshiyayo ngenxa yama-Israyeli azafana lezindawo ezatshiyelwa izixukwana lezihlahlanyana. Konke kuzakuba yincithakalo.
Zonke zizatshiyelwa izinyoni zasezintabeni ezidla inyama,
izipho zizalethwa entabeni iZiyoni, endaweni yeBizo likaThixo uSomandla.
Khangela uThixo ukhwele phezu kweyezi elilesiqubu
njalo inhliziyo zamaGibhithe ziba buthakathaka ngaphakathi kwawo.
njalo ngizakwenza amacebo abo abe yize;
njalo bonke abahola imiholo bazakuba lusizi.
Izikhulu zaseZowani azisilutho kodwa izithutha nje;
abaluleki bakaFaro abahlakaniphileyo banika izeluleko zobuwula.
UThixo usethele umoya wesiyezi phakathi kwabo;
benza iGibhithe ibhadazele kukho konke ekwenzayo,
ikhanda loba umsila, ugatsha lwelala loba umhlanga.
Ngalolosuku abaseGibhithe bazafana labesifazane. Bazathuthumela ngokwesaba isandla esiphakanyisiweyo uThixo uSomandla abaphakamisele sona.
Lelizwe lakoJuda lizaletha ukwesaba kwabaseGibhithe. Bonke okuzakhulunywa kubo ngoJuda bazathuthumela, ngenxa yalokho uThixo uSomandla aceba ukukwenza kubo.
Ngalolosuku amadolobho amahlanu aseGibhithe azakhuluma ulimi lwaseKhenani, afungele ukwethembeka kuThixo uSomandla. Elinye lawo lizathiwa liDolobho leNcithakalo.
Ngalolosuku kuzakuba le-alithari likaThixo phakathi kwelizwe laseGibhithe, lelitshe lesikhumbuzo sikaThixo emngceleni walo.
Lizakuba yisibonakaliso lobufakazi kuThixo uSomandla elizweni laseGibhithe. Lapho bekhalaza kuThixo ngenxa yabancindezeli babo, uzabathumela umsindisi lomvikeli, abahlenge.
Kanjalo uThixo uzakwenza ukuba azakale kwabaseGibhithe, njalo ngalolosuku bazamvuma uThixo. Bazakhonza ngemihlatshelo langeminikelo yamabele; bazakwenza izifungo kuThixo, bazigcine.
UThixo uzatshaya iGibhithe ngesifo; uzabatshaya aphinde abasilise. Bazaphendukela kuThixo, njalo uzakuzwa imikhuleko yabo abasilise.
Ngalolosuku bazakuba lomgwaqo osuka eGibhithe usiya e-Asiriya. Abase-Asiriya bazakuya eGibhithe, abeGibhithe labo baye e-Asiriya. AbaseGibhithe labase-Asiriya bazakhonza ndawonye.
Ngalolosuku i-Israyeli izakuba ngeyesithathu kanye leGibhithe le-Asiriya kube yisibusiso emhlabeni.
UThixo uSomandla uzababusisa esithi, “Kayibusiswe iGibhithe abantu bami, i-Asiriya umsebenzi wezandla zami le-Israyeli ilifa lami.”
Lonke lina elabanjwayo lathathwa ukuba libe yizibotshwa ndawonye,
Izigodi zakho ezinhle kakhulu zigcwele izinqola zempi,
Phakathi kwemiduli yomibili wakha indawo yokugcinela
kumbe umnake Lowo owaceba ukusenza kudala.
UThixo uSomandla usekuvezile lokhu ngisizwa: “Lesisono kasiyikuthethelelwa kuze kube lusuku lwakho lokufa,” kutsho iNkosi, uThixo uSomandla.
Lokhu yikho okutshiwo yiNkosi, uThixo uSomandla, uthi:
Wenzani lapha, njalo ngubani okuphe imvumo ukuba
Qaphela, sekuseduze ukuthi uThixo akubambe aqinise,
Lezigqoko zakho zempi ezinhle zizasala khonapho,
Ngalolosuku ngizabiza inceku yami, u-Eliyakhimu indodana kaHilikhiya.
Ngizamgqokisa izembatho zakho, ngimbophe ngebhanti lakho, ngimnike amandla akho. Uzakuba nguyise walabo abahlala eJerusalema lakwabendlu kaJuda.
Ngizabeka phezu kwamahlombe akhe isivulo sendlu kaDavida; akuvulayo kakho ongakuvala.
Ngizambethela njengesikhonkwane endaweni eqinileyo; uzakuba yisihlalo sobukhosi sasendlini kayise.
Lonke udumo lwakwabo luzakuba kuye, inzalo yakhona lezizukulwane zonke, izitsha zakhona ezincinyane, kusukela emiganwini kusiya enkonxeni zonke.
“Ngalolosuku,” kutsho uThixo uSomandla, “isikhonkwane esabethelwa endaweni eqinileyo sizakhumuka; sizaqunywa siwe, umthwalo ophezu kwaso uzawela phansi.” UThixo usekhulumile.
kulelodolobho, iqhono lalabo asebelaliswe liwayini phansi!
Umqhele lowo wamaluba, iqhono lezidakwa zako-Efrayimi
okuthi khonokho nje omunye ewubona awukhe ngesandla
Ngakho ilizwi likaThixo kubo lizakuba ngelithi:
Ngakho-ke zwanini ilizwi likaThixo lina bantu abaklolodayo,
ngoba senze amanga aba yisiphephelo sethu
Ngakho lokhu yikho okutshiwo nguThixo woBukhosi:
Umbheda mfitshane kakhulu ukuba unabe kuwo,
ingubo incane kakhulu ukuba ugoqelwe ngayo.
UThixo uzavuka njengalokho akwenzayo entabeni iPherazimu;
ukuba enze umsebenzi wakhe, umsebenzi oyisimanga,
funa amaketane elibotshwe ngawo alisinde kakhulu;
Lapho umlimi elima ukuba ahlanyele, ulima kokuphela na?
Uqhubeka elima umhlabathi ewubhuqa kokuphela na?
Amabele kumele acholwe ukuba kwenziwe isinkwa,
Lanxa ehambisa inqola yakhe yokubhula phezu kwawo,
Konke lokhu lakho kuvela kuThixo uSomandla
Ilizwi lakho lizafana lelethonga liphuma phansi emhlabathini.
Lapho-ke amaxuku ezizwe zonke ezilwa le-Ariyeli,
kodwa aphaphame ukulamba kwakhe kulokhu kunjalo,
kodwa aphaphame engelamandla, ukoma kwakhe kungaphelanga.

Kini umbono wonke lo kawusilutho kodwa amazwi nje avalelwe encwadini egoqiweyo. Njalo nxa incwadi leyo liyiqhubela umuntu okwaziyo ukubala lithi kuye, “Ake ubale lokhu,” uzaphendula athi, “Anganelisi, ngoba ivaliwe.”
Loba nxa incwadi leyo liyiqhubela umuntu ongakwaziyo ukubala lithi kuye, “Ake ubale lokhu,” uzaphendula athi, “Angikwazi ukubala.”
kwenziwa kuphela nje ngemilayo abayifundiswa ngabantu.
abenzela imisebenzi yabo emnyameni bacabange bathi,
kuthi insimu evundileyo ifane legusu na?
labo abenza umuntu abe lecala ngokufakaza amanga,
Ngakho-ke lokhu yikho uThixo owahlenga u-Abhrahama akutshoyo kwabendlu kaJakhobe:
Maye kulabo abaya eGibhithe ukuyafuna usizo,
Ikanti laye uhlakaniphile njalo angaletha incithakalo;
Lokhu yikho okutshiwo nguThixo kimi, ukuthi:
ukuba alwe entabeni iZiyoni laseziqongweni zayo.
Awu bantu bako-Israyeli, buyelani kulowo elamhlamukela kakubi.
Ngoba ngalolosuku lonke lizazilahla izithombe zenu zesiliva lezegolide elizenze ngezandla zenu ezonayo.
lapho bebona uphawu lwempi izinduna zabo zempi zizatshaywa luvalo,”
Elakuthumbayo, lina zizwe, kubuthwa sengangathi kuqoqwa yisikhongwane,
ukumesaba uThixo kuyisiqokoqela sokuzuza ingcebo le.
Khangelani, amaqhawe akibo ahlaba umkhosi emigwaqweni!
Ngubani owakithi ongahlala lokutshisa okungapheliyo na?”
avale amehlo akhe ukuze angaboni okubi,
Amehlo enu azayibona inkosi ebuhleni bayo,
Ezingqondweni zenu lizakhumbula ukwesaba kwakuqala lithi:
indawo yokuhlala elokuthula, ithente elingeke lisuswe;
Kuzafana lendawo elemifula ebanzi kanye lezifula.
labantu abahlala khona bazathethelelwa izono zabo.
ulaka lwakhe luphezu kwezitha zabo zonke.
isikhova esikhulu lewabayi kuzakwakha izidleke zakho kulo.
Izikhulu zalo kaziyikuba lalutho olungathiwa ngumbuso,
Isikhova sizakwakha isidleke khona sibekele amaqanda,
njalo sizahlala khona kusukela kusizukulwane kusiya kusizukulwane.
Kwathi lapho uHezekhiya, inkosi, esezwe lokhu, wadabula izigqoko zakhe wagqoka amasaka, wasesiya ethempelini likaThixo.
Wathuma u-Eliyakhimu umphathi wesigodlo, uShebhina umabhalane labaphristi abangabakhokheli, bonke begqoke amasaka, baya kumphrofethi u-Isaya indodana ka-Amozi.
Bathi kuye, “UHezekhiya uthi: ilanga lanamhla lusuku losizi lokusolwa kanye lehlazo njengalapho abantwana sekufike isikhathi sokuthi bazalwe kodwa amandla okubeletha engekho.

Mhlawumbe uThixo uNkulunkulu wakho izawezwa amazwi omlawuli webutho, onkosi yakhe, inkosi yase-Asiriya, emthume ukuba athuke uNkulunkulu ophilayo, lokuthi uzamthuka ngenxa yamazwi uThixo uNkulunkulu wakho ewazwileyo. Ngakho-ke khulekela insali elokhu iphila.”
Kwathi izithunywa zenkosi uHezekhiya sezifikile ku-Isaya,
u-Isaya wathi kuzo, “Tshelani inkosi yenu lithi, ‘Nanku okutshiwo nguThixo: Ungesabi lokhu okuzwileyo, amazwi lawana izinceku zenkosi yase-Asiriya ezingithuke ngawo.
Lalela! Ngizafaka umoya ozamenza athi nxa esizwa umbiko othile, afune ukubuyela elizweni lakhe, athi angafika khonale ngenze ukuba abulawe ngenkemba.’ ”
Kwathi lapho umlawuli webutho esezwile ukuthi inkosi yase-Asiriya yayisisukile eLakhishi, laye wasuka wayathola inkosi isilwa leLibhina.
USenakheribhi wemukela umbiko othi uThirihaka inkosi yaseKhushi, wayesiza ukuba amhlasele. Esezwe lokho wathumela izithunywa kuHezekhiya lombiko othi:
“Tshela uHezekhiya inkosi yakoJuda ukuthi: Ungavumi ukuthi unkulunkulu omthembileyo akukhohlise esithi, ‘IJerusalema kaliyikunikelwa enkosini yase-Asiriya.’
Ngempela usukuzwile okwenziwa ngamakhosi ase-Asiriya emazweni wonke, ewabhidliza okupheleleyo. Wena-ke uzaphepha na?
Onkulunkulu bezizwe ezatshabalaliswa ngokhokho bami bake bazikhulula na, onkulunkulu beGozani, iHarani, iRezefi kanye labantu base-Edeni ababeseThelasari?
Ingaphi inkosi yaseHamathi, inkosi yase-Ariphadi, angaphi amakhosi aseLayiri leSefavayimi, loba eyaseHena kumbe eyase-Iva?”
UHezekhiya wemukela incwadi eyeza lezithunywa wayibala. Emva kwalokho waya ethempelini leNkosi, wayichaya phambi kukaThixo.
“Thixo Somandla, Nkulunkulu ka-Israyeli osebukhosini phakathi kwamaKherubhi, wena kuphela nguwe onguNkulunkulu wemibuso yonke yasemhlabeni. Nguwe owenza izulu lomhlaba.
Beka indlebe Thixo, uzwe; vula amehlo akho Thixo, ubone. Lalela uzwe wonke amazwi uSenakheribhi awathumele ukuzathuka uNkulunkulu ophilayo.
Kuliqiniso, Thixo, ukuthi amakhosi ase-Asiriya abatshabalalisa bonke lababantu kanye lamazwe abo.
Aphosele onkulunkulu bawo emlilweni abatshabalalisa, ngoba kungesibo onkulunkulu kodwa yizigodo lamatshe kuphela, okubunjwe ngezandla zabantu.
Khathesi, Thixo, Nkulunkulu wethu, sikhulule esandleni sakhe, ukuze imibuso yonke emhlabeni ibekwazi ukuthi wena Thixo, nguwe wedwa onguNkulunkulu.”
U-Isaya indodana ka-Amozi wathumela ilizwi kuHezekhiya elithi, “Nanku okutshiwo nguThixo, uNkulunkulu ka-Israyeli: Ngenxa yokuthi ukhulekile kimi mayelana ngoSenakheribhi inkosi yase-Asiriya,
nanti ilizwi uThixo aselikhulume ngaye wathi:
inqekuza ikhanda layo lapho wena ubaleka.
langenxa yokuthi ubuqholo bakho sebufikile ezindlebeni zami,
izagxilisa njalo impande phansi ithele izithelo ngaphezulu.
kuthi entabeni iZiyoni kuphume ixuku labasindayo.
Ngakho-ke mayelana lenkosi yase-Asiriya uThixo uthi:
ngenxa yami langenxa kaDavida inceku yami!

Lapho-ke ingilosi kaThixo yasuka yayabulala abantu abalikhulu elilamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lanhlanu lezinkulungwane ezihonqweni zama-Asiriya. Kwathi lapho abantu bevuka ekuseni kwakhona bonke kwasekuyizidumbu kuphela!
Ngakho uSenakheribhi inkosi yama-Asiriya wasuka ezihonqweni wahamba. Wabuyela eNiniva wahlala khona.

Kwathi ngolunye usuku ekhonza ethempelini likaNisirokhi unkulunkulu wakhe, amadodana akhe u-Adrameleki loShareza ambulala ngenkemba asebalekela elizweni lase-Ararathi. U-Esarihadoni indodana yakhe yaba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe.”
Ngalesosikhathi uMerodakhi-Bhaladani indodana kaBhaladani inkosi yaseBhabhiloni, wathumela izincwadi lesipho kuHezekhiya, ngoba wayezwile ngokugula kwakhe lokusila kwakhe.

UHezekhiya wazamukela izithunywa ngokuthaba, wazitshengisa okwakusendlini yakhe yokugcinela impahla, isiliva, igolide, iziyoliso, amafutha acengekileyo, izikhali zakhe zonke, lakho konke okwakukhona enothweni yakhe. Akulalutho esigodlweni sakhe loba embusweni wakhe wonke angazitshengisanga khona.
Ngakho u-Isaya umphrofethi waya kuHezekhiya inkosi wambuza wathi, “Atheni amadoda lawana, njalo avela ngaphi?”
UHezekhiya waphendula wathi, “Avela elizweni elikhatshana. Aze kimi evela eBhabhiloni.”
UHezekhiya wathi, “Abone konke okusesigodlweni sami. Akulalutho phakathi kwempahla zami eziligugu engingawatshengisanga khona.”
Ngakho u-Isaya wasesithi kuHezekhiya, “Zwana ilizwi likaThixo uSomandla lithi:
Isikhathi sizafika sibili lapho konke okusesigodlweni sakho lakho konke oyihlo abakugcinayo kusiyafika lolosuku, kuzathwalelwa eBhabhiloni. Akuyikusala lutho, kutsho uThixo.
Njalo abanye besizukulwane sakho, abenyama legazi lakho, abazazalwa nguwe, bazathathwa bayekuba ngabathenwa esigodlweni senkosi yaseBhabhiloni.”
UHezekhiya waphendula wathi, “Ilizwi likaThixo olikhulumileyo lilungile.” Ngoba wayenakana esithi, “Kuzakuba lokuthula lokuvikeleka ekuphileni kwami.”
kodwa ilizwi likaNkulunkulu limi kuze kube nininini.”
Ngubani olinganise amanzi entendeni yesandla sakhe,
loba walinganisa amazulu ngobubanzi besandla sakhe na?
Ngubani owake wacelwa nguThixo ukuba ameluleke,
njalo ngubani owamfundisa indlela elungileyo na?
Umuntu ongumyanga onganelisiyo ukunikela ngomnikelo onjalo
UThixo uhlezi ebukhosini ngaphezu kwendingiliza yomhlaba,
enze ababusi bomhlaba lo babe yize.
Loba ngubani olingana lami na?” kutsho yena oNgcwele.
Yena okhupha amaxuku ezinkanyezi ngalinye ngalinye,
Ngenxa yamandla akhe amakhulu lokuqina okulamandla,
ilungelo lami kalinanzwa nguNkulunkulu wami na?”
“Thulani lithi zwi phambi kwami lina zihlenge!
ngedandili lakhe awenze abe ngamakhoba aphetshulwa ngumoya.
ukuthi isandla sikaThixo yiso esenza lokhu,
omunye ovela empumalanga obiza ibizo lami.
kakho owake wezwa amazwi aphuma kuwe.
Kodwa khathesi, nanku akutshoyo uThixo uthi,
Njengoba wena uligugu njalo udumile ebusweni bami,
Kabalethe ofakazi babo babonakalise ukuthi baqinisile,
Ngaphambi kwami kakho unkulunkulu owake wabakhona,
njalo kakho ozakuba khona emva kwami.
Lingofakazi bami, ngokuthi mina yimi uNkulunkulu”
njalo lalala lapho, kalaze lavuka futhi;
abantu bakwazi ukuthi kakho omunye ngaphandle kwami.
Labo abahamba bethwele izithombe zezigodo kabazi lutho;
Ngubani elingangilinganisa laye kumbe limbale njengolingana lami na?
Ngubani elingangifananisa laye ukuba siqathaniswe na?
baqhatshe abakhandi begolide ukuba benze unkulunkulu ngalo,
kusukela ekuzalweni kwami ubelitsho ibizo lami.
Wenza umlomo wami waba njengenkemba eloliweyo,
yena owangibumbayo esiswini ukuba ngibe yinceku yakhe
“Kuyinto encane kakhulu kuwe ukuba yinceku yami
ukuze ufikise usindiso lwami emikhawulweni yomhlaba.”
bathole amadlelo kuwo wonke amaqaqa alugwadule.
Izintaba zami zonke ngizazenza zibe yizindlela,
abanye bevela enyakatho, abanye bevela entshonalanga
Phakamisa amehlo akho ukhangele emaceleni wonke,
wonke amadodana akho ayaqoqana eze kuwe.
khathesi uzakuba mncane kakhulu ebantwini bakho;
Bazakhothama phambi kwakho ubuso babo buphansi, emhlabathini,
Ngizakwenza abancindezeli bakho badle inyama yemizimba yabo;
Ekubizeni kwami, kungani kungekho muntu owasabelayo na?
Ingalo yami yayimfitshane kakhulu ukuba ilihlenge na?
inhlanzi zayo zibole ngenxa yokuswela amanzi,
avuse indlebe yami ukuba ilalele njengofundiswayo.
lezihlathi zami kulabo abacutha indevu zami;
Ngakho-ke sengiqinise ubuso bami babanjengelitshe lomlilo;
Kodwa khathesi, lonke lina eliphemba imililo
abe lesihawu kuwo wonke amanxiwa alo;
amazwe alo alugwadule afane lesivande sikaThixo.
Kodwa insindiso yami izakuba khona kuze kube nininini,
lina bantu abagcina umthetho wami ezinhliziyweni zenu:
